At the same time, lift your arms up so they are at shoulder height but still extended fully out to your sides.
You should now have landed in what looks similar to a star or 'X' shape.
Next you should reverse this movement. So gently squat to generate enough force so that you jump and land in a narrow stance, whilst bringing your arms back into the sides of your torso.
This movement should be done at quite a fast tempo so that both stages seamlessly run from one to the other.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Adopte una posición de pie relajada con una postura a la altura de los hombros y permita que los brazos cuelguen a los costados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Este movimiento se divide en dos etapas. El primer movimiento es una pequeña sentadilla, por lo que debes doblar las rodillas y las caderas para generar suficiente potencia para levantarte del suelo saltando. Una vez que hayas hecho esto, empuja el suelo para extender las rodillas y las caderas, lo que te impulsará a dar un salto. Cuando estés en el aire, debes dividir las piernas para que cuando aterrices tengas una postura amplia. Al mismo tiempo, levante los brazos para que queden a la altura de los hombros pero aún completamente extendidos hacia los costados.
Ahora deberías haber aterrizado en lo que parece similar a una estrella o forma de "X".

A continuación debes invertir este movimiento. Así que agáchate suavemente para generar suficiente fuerza para saltar y aterrizar en una postura estrecha, mientras llevas los brazos hacia los costados del torso.
Este movimiento debe realizarse a un ritmo bastante rápido para que ambas etapas transcurran sin problemas de una a otra.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Stairmaster
instructions: To begin, step onto the stairmaster and select the desired option from the menu. You can choose a manual setting, or you can select a program to run. Typically, you can enter your age and weight to estimate the amount of calories burned during exercise.

Pump your legs up and down in an established rhythm, driving the pedals down but not all the way to the floor. It is recommended that you maintain your grip on the handles so that you don’t fall. The handles can be used to monitor your heart rate to help you stay at an appropriate intensity.

Stairmasters offer convenience, cardiovascular benefits, and usually have less impact than running outside. They are typically much harder than other cardio equipment. A 150 lb person will typically burn over 300 calories in 30 minutes, compared to about 175 calories walking.

Mueva las piernas hacia arriba y hacia abajo a un ritmo establecido, pisando los pedales pero no hasta el suelo. Se recomienda mantener el agarre en las manijas para no caerse. Los mangos se pueden utilizar para controlar su frecuencia cardíaca y ayudarle a mantener una intensidad adecuada.

Las escaleras maestras ofrecen comodidad, beneficios cardiovasculares y, por lo general, tienen menos impacto que correr al aire libre. name: Rowing - Stationary
instructions: Firstly, you need to set the resistance of the rower to the desired amount. Once you have done this, take a seat on the rower and place your feet into the foot holders. Have your heels tucked into the base of the holders and the straps pulled tightly over each of your shoes (just below the base of your toes). After this, you need to set the program you wish to complete from the display unit (if applicable).
Next you will need to take hold of the oars (handle) by bending at your knees and hip joints and slightly leaning your torso forward whilst maintaining a straight back.

Now exhale and simultaneously push through the middle of your feet to extend your knee and hip joints so that your legs straighten out (slight bend at your knees) whilst pulling your arms in towards your abdominals. In order to create this movement, retract your shoulders and pull hard with your arm and back muscles. Tip: Your back should remain straight throughout this movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the oars back along the same path into the starting position, ready for the next row.
Continue in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of exercise.

es: cuádriceps

en: Firstly, you need to set the resistance of the rower to the desired amount. Once you have done this, take a seat on the rower and place your feet into the foot holders. Have your heels tucked into the base of the holders and the straps pulled tightly over each of your shoes (just below the base of your toes). After this, you need to set the program you wish to complete from the display unit (if applicable).
Next you will need to take hold of the oars (handle) by bending at your knees and hip joints and slightly leaning your torso forward whilst maintaining a straight back.

Now exhale and simultaneously push through the middle of your feet to extend your knee and hip joints so that your legs straighten out (slight bend at your knees) whilst pulling your arms in towards your abdominals. In order to create this movement, retract your shoulders and pull hard with your arm and back muscles. Tip: Your back should remain straight throughout this movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the oars back along the same path into the starting position, ready for the next row.
Continue in this manner until you complete the recommended amount of exercise.
es: En primer lugar, debes ajustar la resistencia del remero a la cantidad deseada. Una vez hecho esto, siéntate en el remo y coloca los pies en los soportes para los pies. Meta los talones en la base de los soportes y ajuste las correas firmemente sobre cada uno de sus zapatos (justo debajo de la base de los dedos de los pies). Después de esto, debe configurar el programa que desea completar desde la unidad de visualización (si corresponde).
A continuación, deberás agarrar los remos (mango) doblando las rodillas y las articulaciones de la cadera e inclinando ligeramente el torso hacia adelante mientras mantienes la espalda recta.

Ahora exhale y simultáneamente empuje por la mitad de los pies para extender las articulaciones de la rodilla y la cadera de modo que las piernas se estiren (doble ligeramente las rodillas) mientras tira de los brazos hacia los abdominales. Para crear este movimiento, retraiga los hombros y tire con fuerza con los músculos del brazo y la espalda. Consejo: tu espalda debe permanecer recta durante todo este movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa los remos por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial, listos para la siguiente fila.
Continúe de esta manera hasta completar la carga indicada de ejercicio.

name: Recumbent Bike
instructions: First of all you will need to set the saddle in the correct position. In order to do this you will need to take a seat and have your feet in/on the pedals. Now move the seat in/out until you are in a comfortable position, with your knees slightly bent when at full extension.
Start pedalling and select the appropriate setting from the menu.
Continue until you have completed the prescribed amount of exercise.

Comience a pedalear y seleccione la configuración adecuada en el menú.
Continúe hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de ejercicio.

name: Skipping
instructions: Grab a handle in each hand of a skipping rope with the band gently laying on the floor behind you. Rotate your wrists so that the rope comes up and over your head, when it reaches the floor in front of your body jump over it. Find a speed at which you can maintain this movement repeatedly.
Continue until you have completed the prescribed amount of exercise.

Encuentra una velocidad a la que puedas mantener este movimiento repetidamente.
Continúe hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de ejercicio.

name: Bench Sprint
instructions: Stand on the ground with one foot resting on a bench or box with your heel close to the edge.
Push off with your foot on top of the bench, extending through the hip and knee.
Land with the opposite foot on top of the box, returning your other foot back to the start position.
Continue alternating from one foot to another to complete the set.

es: Párese en el suelo con un pie apoyado en un banco o caja con el talón cerca del borde.
Empuja con el pie encima del banco, extendiéndolo a través de la cadera y la rodilla.
Aterriza con el pie opuesto encima de la caja y regresa el otro pie a la posición inicial.
Continúe alternando de un pie a otro para completar la serie.

name: Bicycling - Stationary
instructions: First of all you will need to set the height of the saddle. Therefore you will need to stand next to the bike and adjust the height so that it is at 'hip height'.
Take a seat on the bike and adjust the saddle further if necessary. Your knees should still have a slight bend when at full extension.
Start pedalling and select the appropriate setting from the menu.
Continue until you have completed the prescribed amount of exercise.

es: En primer lugar deberás establecer la altura del sillín. Por lo tanto, tendrás que pararte al lado de la bicicleta y ajustar la altura para que quede a la "altura de la cadera".
Siéntate en la bicicleta y ajusta más el sillín si es necesario. Tus rodillas aún deben tener una ligera flexión cuando estén completamente extendidas.
Comience a pedalear y seleccione la configuración adecuada en el menú.
Continúe hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de ejercicio.

name: Step Up With Knee Raise
instructions: Stand facing a box or bench of an appropriate height with your feet together. This will be your starting position.

Begin the movement by stepping up, putting your left foot on the top of the bench. Extend through the hip and knee of your front leg to stand up on the box. As you stand on the box with your left leg, flex your right knee and hip, bringing your knee as high as you can.
Reverse this motion to step down off the box, and then repeat the sequence on the opposite leg.

name.es: Da un paso adelante con elevación de rodilla

en: Stand facing a box or bench of an appropriate height with your feet together. This will be your starting position.

Begin the movement by stepping up, putting your left foot on the top of the bench. Extend through the hip and knee of your front leg to stand up on the box. As you stand on the box with your left leg, flex your right knee and hip, bringing your knee as high as you can.
Reverse this motion to step down off the box, and then repeat the sequence on the opposite leg.
es: Párese frente a una caja o banco de una altura adecuada con los pies juntos. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Comience el movimiento subiendo y poniendo el pie izquierdo en la parte superior del banco. Extiende la cadera y la rodilla de la pierna delantera para pararte sobre la caja. Mientras estás parado sobre la caja con la pierna izquierda, flexiona la rodilla y la cadera derechas, elevando la rodilla lo más que puedas.
Invierte este movimiento para bajar de la caja y luego repite la secuencia en la pierna opuesta.

name: Standing Pelvic Tilt
instructions: Start off with your feet hip-distance apart.
Bend your knees slightly to keep them soft and springy.
You may want to move your pelvis forward and backward and back few times before holding the tailbone forward in this stretch.

es: Comience con los pies separados a la altura de las caderas.
Doble ligeramente las rodillas para mantenerlas suaves y elásticas.
Es posible que desees mover la pelvis hacia adelante, hacia atrás y hacia atrás varias veces antes de sostener el coxis hacia adelante en este estiramiento.

name: Bodyweight Bulgarian Split Squats
instructions: Being in a standing position. Jump into a split leg position, with one leg forward and one leg back, flexing the knees and lowering your hips slightly as you do so.
As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing back up and jumping, reversing the position of your legs. Repeat 5-10 times on each leg.

As you descend, immediately reverse direction, standing back up and jumping, reversing the position of your legs. Repeat 5-10 times on each leg.
es: Estar en posición de pie. Salta a una posición de pierna dividida, con una pierna hacia adelante y otra hacia atrás, flexionando las rodillas y bajando ligeramente las caderas mientras lo haces.
A medida que desciendes, invierte inmediatamente la dirección, levantándote y saltando, invirtiendo la posición de tus piernas. Repita de 5 a 10 veces en cada pierna.

name: Single Leg Bodyweight Bridges
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down on your back (face up). Have your torso flat on the floor with your arms by your sides. One of your feet should be planted on the floor with your knees bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees), the other should be extended towards the ceiling as vertical as possible. This is your starting position.To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your heel to lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes. As you do so, lean back onto your shoulders and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted.After a brief pause, inhale and gently relax your glutes to drop your pelvis towards the floor (the resistance should be placed through your heel). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glutes touch the floor.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.Variations: Barbell Glute Bridges or Barbell Hip Thrusts.

name.es: Puentes de peso corporal con una sola pierna

en: glutes
es: glúteos

en: hamstrings
es: isquiosurales

en: Grab a mat and lay down on your back (face up). Have your torso flat on the floor with your arms by your sides. One of your feet should be planted on the floor with your knees bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees), the other should be extended towards the ceiling as vertical as possible. This is your starting position.To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your heel to lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes. As you do so, lean back onto your shoulders and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted.After a brief pause, inhale and gently relax your glutes to drop your pelvis towards the floor (the resistance should be placed through your heel). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glutes touch the floor.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.Variations: Barbell Glute Bridges or Barbell Hip Thrusts.
es: Coge una colchoneta y acuéstate boca arriba (boca arriba). Mantenga el torso apoyado en el suelo con los brazos a los lados. Uno de tus pies debe estar plantado en el suelo con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo agudo (menos de 90 grados), el otro debe estar extendido hacia el techo lo más vertical posible. Esta es tu posición inicial. Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y conduce con el talón para levantar las caderas hacia el techo apretando los glúteos. Mientras lo hace, inclínese hacia atrás sobre los hombros y siga subiendo hasta que los glúteos estén completamente contraídos. Después de una breve pausa, inhale y relaje suavemente los glúteos para dejar caer la pelvis hacia el suelo (la resistencia debe colocarse a través del talón). Continúe bajando la pelvis hasta que los glúteos toquen el suelo. Repita la número indicado de repeticiones e intercambie lados. Variaciones: puentes de glúteos con barra o empujes de cadera con barra.

name: Single Leg Butt Kick
instructions: Begin by standing on one leg, with the bent knee raised. This will be your start position.
Using a countermovement jump, take off upward by extending the hip, knee, and ankle of the grounded leg.
Immediately flex the knee and attempt to touch your butt with the heel of your jumping leg.
Return the leg to a partially bent position underneath the hips and land. Your opposite leg should stay in relatively the same position throughout the drill.

name.es: Patada a tope con una sola pierna

en: quadriceps
es: cuádriceps

en: calves
hamstrings
es: gemelos
isquiosurales

en: Begin by standing on one leg, with the bent knee raised. This will be your start position.
Using a countermovement jump, take off upward by extending the hip, knee, and ankle of the grounded leg.
Immediately flex the knee and attempt to touch your butt with the heel of your jumping leg.
Return the leg to a partially bent position underneath the hips and land. Your opposite leg should stay in relatively the same position throughout the drill.
es: Comience parándose sobre una pierna, con la rodilla doblada levantada. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Usando un salto con contramovimiento, despegue hacia arriba extendiendo la cadera, la rodilla y el tobillo de la pierna apoyada en el suelo.
Flexione inmediatamente la rodilla e intente tocar su trasero con el talón de la pierna que salta.
Regrese la pierna a una posición parcialmente doblada debajo de las caderas y aterrice. La pierna opuesta debe permanecer relativamente en la misma posición durante todo el ejercicio.

name: Lying Side Leg Raises
instructions: Lay flat on the floor, on your side. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your top leg straight, raise it as far out to the side as possible away from the body and slowly return to the starting point.
Repeat this motion for the set amount of reps/time.

name.es: Elevaciones de piernas acostadas de lado

en: adductors
es: aductores

en: Lay flat on the floor, on your side. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your top leg straight, raise it as far out to the side as possible away from the body and slowly return to the starting point.
Repeat this motion for the set amount of reps/time.
es: Acuéstese en el suelo, de lado. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Manteniendo la pierna superior recta, levántela lo más lejos posible del cuerpo y regrese lentamente al punto de partida.
Repita este movimiento durante la cantidad establecida de repeticiones/tiempo.

name: Side Jackknife
instructions: Works your obliques. Lying on your right side and keeping your left leg over your right one, place your right hand in a comfortable spot and clasp your left hand behind your head.
Bring your torso and left leg toward each other as you pull with your obliques. Squeeze for a moment and return to the starting position. You can use ankle weights to make it tougher!

en: abdominals
es: abdominales

en: Works your obliques. Lying on your right side and keeping your left leg over your right one, place your right hand in a comfortable spot and clasp your left hand behind your head.
Bring your torso and left leg toward each other as you pull with your obliques. Squeeze for a moment and return to the starting position. You can use ankle weights to make it tougher!
es: Trabaja tus oblicuos. Tumbado sobre su lado derecho y manteniendo su pierna izquierda sobre la derecha, coloque su mano derecha en un lugar cómodo y junte su mano izquierda detrás de su cabeza.
Acerque el torso y la pierna izquierda mientras tira con los oblicuos. Aprieta por un momento y regresa a la posición inicial. ¡Puedes usar pesas en los tobillos para hacerlo más difícil!

name: Narrow Grip Press Ups
instructions: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure that you are holding your torso up at arms' length.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your triceps and some of your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations:

If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, you can either bend your legs at the knees to take off resistance or perform the exercise against the wall instead of the floor.
For the most advanced lifters, you can place your feet at a high surface such as a bench in order to increase the resistance.
See Also: Push-Up

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: chest
shoulders
es: pecho
hombros

en: Lie on the floor face down and place your hands closer than shoulder width for a close hand position. Make sure that you are holding your torso up at arms' length.
Lower yourself until your chest almost touches the floor as you inhale.
Using your triceps and some of your pectoral muscles, press your upper body back up to the starting position and squeeze your chest. Breathe out as you perform this step.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations:

If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, you can either bend your legs at the knees to take off resistance or perform the exercise against the wall instead of the floor.
For the most advanced lifters, you can place your feet at a high surface such as a bench in order to increase the resistance.
See Also: Push-Up
es: Acuéstese en el suelo boca abajo y coloque las manos más cerca que el ancho de los hombros para lograr una posición más cercana. Asegúrate de sostener el torso con los brazos extendidos.
Bájate hasta que tu pecho casi toque el suelo mientras inhalas.
Usando los tríceps y algunos de los músculos pectorales, presione la parte superior del cuerpo hacia la posición inicial y apriete el pecho. Exhale mientras realiza este paso.
Después de una segunda pausa en la posición contraída, repita el movimiento durante la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones:

Si eres nuevo en este ejercicio y no tienes la fuerza para realizarlo, puedes doblar las piernas a la altura de las rodillas para quitar resistencia o realizar el ejercicio contra la pared en lugar del suelo.
Para los levantadores más avanzados, puedes colocar los pies en una superficie alta, como un banco, para aumentar la resistencia.
Ver también: Flexiones

name: Wide Grip Pull Ups
instructions: Take hold of a pull up bar with a wide, overhand grip (palms facing away from you). After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your hands as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back (more so with your back). Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as it can be.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldowns or T-Bar Rows with a Handle.

en: lats
es: dorsales

en: biceps
middle back
es: bíceps
espalda media

en: Take hold of a pull up bar with a wide, overhand grip (palms facing away from you). After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your hands as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back (more so with your back). Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as it can be.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldowns or T-Bar Rows with a Handle.
es: Sujete una barra de dominadas con un agarre amplio y por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia afuera). Después de haber agarrado firmemente las manijas, levante los pies del piso para que su cuerpo cuelgue de su agarre. Tire de los talones hacia los glúteos para que las rodillas queden dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados y las caderas empujadas hacia adelante. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar este movimiento, exhale y tire del torso hacia las manos mientras contrae los bíceps y los músculos de la espalda (más aún en la espalda). Continúe levantándose hasta que su pecho esté lo más alto posible.
Después de una breve pausa, regrese el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Jalones laterales o remo con barra en T con mango.

name: Prisoner Squat Jumps
instructions: Stand with your hands behind your head, and squat down keeping your torso upright and your head up. This will be your starting position.
Jump forward several feet, avoiding jumping unnecessarily high. As your feet contact the ground, absorb the impact through your legs, and jump again. Repeat this action 5-10 times.

en: quadriceps
es: cuádriceps

en: calves
glutes
hamstrings
es: gemelos
glúteos
isquiosurales

en: Stand with your hands behind your head, and squat down keeping your torso upright and your head up. This will be your starting position.
Jump forward several feet, avoiding jumping unnecessarily high. As your feet contact the ground, absorb the impact through your legs, and jump again. Repeat this action 5-10 times.
es: Párese con las manos detrás de la cabeza y agáchese manteniendo el torso erguido y la cabeza erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Salta varios metros hacia adelante, evitando saltar innecesariamente alto. Cuando tus pies entren en contacto con el suelo, absorbe el impacto a través de tus piernas y salta nuevamente. Repita esta acción de 5 a 10 veces.

name: Prisoner Squats
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. You can place your hands behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing your knees and hips, sitting back with your hips.
Continue down to full depth if you are able,and quickly reverse the motion until you return to the starting position. As you squat, keep your head and chest up and push your knees out.

en: quadriceps
es: cuádriceps

en: glutes
hamstrings
es: glúteos
isquiosurales

en: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. You can place your hands behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing your knees and hips, sitting back with your hips.
Continue down to full depth if you are able,and quickly reverse the motion until you return to the starting position. As you squat, keep your head and chest up and push your knees out.
es: Párese con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Puedes colocar tus manos detrás de tu cabeza. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comienza el movimiento flexionando las rodillas y las caderas, sentándote hacia atrás con las caderas.

Continúe hasta alcanzar la profundidad máxima si puede y rápidamente invierta el movimiento hasta regresar a la posición inicial. Mientras te pones en cuclillas, mantén la cabeza y el pecho erguidos y empuja las rodillas hacia afuera.

name: Plyometric Press Ups
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and feet. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whist flaring your elbows out wide. When you are about an inch or so from the ground, you should have created a triangle with your hand positions and your eye line.
Exhale and explosively press hard enough through your palms to return your body not only along the same path but to enable you to lift your hands off the floor.
When your bodyweight is on it's descent, land into the next repetition.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.

en: chest
es: pecho

en: shoulders
triceps
es: hombros
tríceps

en: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and feet. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whist flaring your elbows out wide. When you are about an inch or so from the ground, you should have created a triangle with your hand positions and your eye line.
Exhale and explosively press hard enough through your palms to return your body not only along the same path but to enable you to lift your hands off the floor.
When your bodyweight is on it's descent, land into the next repetition.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.
es: Para comenzar este ejercicio, arrodíllate en el suelo e inclínate hacia adelante de modo que ahora quedes con el peso al descubierto en tus brazos. Coloque sus manos justo afuera de donde estaría su pecho. Ahora debes ponerte de pie de manera que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el suelo, los únicos puntos de contacto (con el suelo) deben ser tus manos y pies. Su cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y sus brazos perpendiculares al suelo debajo de su pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, baje lentamente el pecho hacia el suelo mientras abre los codos. Cuando esté aproximadamente a una pulgada del suelo, debería haber creado un triángulo con las posiciones de sus manos y la línea de sus ojos.
Exhale y presione explosivamente con suficiente fuerza a través de las palmas para que su cuerpo regrese no solo por el mismo camino sino que le permita levantar las manos del suelo.
Cuando tu peso corporal esté descendiendo, aterriza en la siguiente repetición.
Repita el movimiento durante la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca o flexiones.

name: Parallel Bar Dips
instructions: Stand between a set of parallel bars. Place a hand on each bar, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: chest

en: Stand between a set of parallel bars. Place a hand on each bar, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Párate entre un conjunto de barras paralelas. Coloque una mano en cada barra y luego dé un pequeño salto para ayudarlo a llegar a la posición inicial con los brazos bloqueados.
Comienza flexionando el codo, bajando el cuerpo hasta que los brazos rompan los 90 grados. Evite balancearse y mantenga una buena postura durante todo el descenso.
Invierta el movimiento extendiendo el codo y empujándose hacia arriba hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Narrow Stance Bodyweight Squats
instructions: This exercise is best performed inside a squat rack for safety purposes.  To begin, first set the bar on a rack that best matches your height.  Once the correct height is chosen and the bar is loaded, step under the bar and place the back of your shoulders (slightly below the neck) across it.
Hold on to the bar using both arms at each side and lift it off the rack by first pushing with your legs and at the same time straightening your torso.

Step away from the rack and position your legs using a less-than-shoulder-width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Feet should be around 3-6 inches apart.  Keep your head up at all times (looking down will get you off balance) and maintain a straight back.  This will be your starting position.  (Note: For the purposes of this discussion we will use the medium stance described above which targets overall development; however you can choose any of the three stances discussed in the foot stances section).

Begin to slowly lower the bar by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up.  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor).  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: If you performed the exercise correctly, the front of the knees should make an imaginary straight line with the toes that is perpendicular to the front.  If your knees are past that imaginary line (if they are past your toes) then you are placing undue stress on the knee and the exercise has been performed incorrectly.
Begin to raise the bar as you exhale by pushing the floor with the heel of your foot mainly as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution:  This is not an exercise to be taken lightly.  If you have back issues, substitute it with the dumbbell squat variation or a leg press instead.  If you have a healthy back, ensure perfect form and never slouch the back forward as this can cause back injury. Be cautious as well with the weight used; in case of doubt, use less weight rather than more.  The squat is a very safe exercise but only if performed properly.
Variations:
As previously mentioned, there are various stances that can be used depending on what you want to emphasize.
You can also place a small block under the heels to improve balance.

Dumbbells can be used as well for resistance by holding them to your sides.  The use of wrist wraps is a necessity due to the amount of weights used.  I find this an excellent variation when my lower back begins to act up after many weeks of regular barbell squats.  (Note: For wide-stance dumbbell squats you will have to hold the dumbbells in between your legs as opposed to both sides in order to be able to distance your legs sufficiently).

Another way to perform these is by using a weight belt and attaching weights to it in between the legs.  This variation is referred to as weight-belt squats which need to be performed with the legs placed on two well secured, raised, but separated platforms, that allow the weights to go up and down in the middle. This exercise is an excellent choice for people with lower back problems.  The issue however is finding the platforms that meet the criteria.  The only way I have been able to perform this is when I have two benches placed opposite to each other with spotting platforms that are facing each other.  If you move the benches close enough then you get can execute the weight-belt squats by using the spotting platform.

Finally, you can also perform squats in a Smith Machine though I do not recommend this.  The reason for not performing regular squats on the Smith Machine is that since the machine allows you to execute the exercise while leaning versus the bar, hip flexor involvement is minimized taking the hamstring out of the exercise.  While this does take pressure off the lower back, hamstring involvement is a requirement to stabilize the knee-cap.  So, as a result, what is created is a situation where destructive forces place a huge stress on the ACL (anterior cruciate ligament; a primary ligament in the knee capsule whose job is to provide knee stability) by pushing the knee-cap forward.  For this reason, I highly recommend against Smith Machine use for squats. If you still insist on doing so, make sure it is a sporadic use rather than frequent, and also be sure to control the amount of weight used.

es: Este ejercicio se realiza mejor dentro de una rejilla para sentadillas por motivos de seguridad.  Para comenzar, primero coloque la barra en una rejilla que mejor se adapte a su altura.  Una vez elegida la altura correcta y cargada la barra, colóquese debajo de la barra y coloque la parte posterior de los hombros (ligeramente debajo del cuello) sobre ella.
Sujétate de la barra con ambos brazos a cada lado y levántala del rack empujando primero con las piernas y al mismo tiempo enderezando el torso.

Aléjese de la rejilla y coloque las piernas en una postura estrecha que tenga menos ancho que los hombros y con los dedos de los pies ligeramente apuntados.  Los pies deben estar separados entre 3 y 6 pulgadas.  Mantén la cabeza erguida en todo momento (mirar hacia abajo te hará perder el equilibrio) y mantén la espalda recta.  Esta será tu posición inicial.  (Nota: para los propósitos de esta discusión, usaremos la postura media descrita anteriormente, que apunta al desarrollo general; sin embargo, puede elegir cualquiera de las tres posturas analizadas en la sección de posturas de los pies).

Comienza a bajar lentamente la barra doblando las rodillas mientras mantienes una postura recta con la cabeza erguida.  Continúe hacia abajo hasta que el ángulo entre la parte superior de la pierna y las gemelos sea ligeramente inferior a 90 grados (que es el punto en el que la parte superior de las piernas queda paralela al suelo).  Inhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.  Consejo: Si realizaste el ejercicio correctamente, la parte delantera de las rodillas debe formar una línea recta imaginaria con los dedos de los pies que sea perpendicular al frente.  Si sus rodillas pasan esa línea imaginaria (si pasan los dedos de los pies), entonces está ejerciendo una tensión indebida sobre la rodilla y el ejercicio se ha realizado incorrectamente.
Comienza a elevar la barra mientras exhalas empujando el suelo con el talón del pie principalmente mientras vuelves a estirar las piernas y vuelves a la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

Precaución: Este no es un ejercicio que deba tomarse a la ligera.  Si tiene problemas de espalda, sustitúyalo por la variación de sentadilla con mancuernas o prensa de piernas.  Si tiene una espalda sana, asegúrese de estar en perfecta forma y nunca encorve la espalda hacia adelante, ya que esto puede causar lesiones en la espalda. Tenga cuidado también con el peso utilizado; En caso de duda, utilice menos peso en lugar de más.  La sentadilla es un ejercicio muy seguro pero sólo si se realiza correctamente.
Variaciones:
Como se mencionó anteriormente, existen varias posturas que se pueden utilizar dependiendo de lo que se quiera enfatizar.
También puedes colocar un pequeño bloque debajo de los talones para mejorar el equilibrio.

Las mancuernas también se pueden utilizar como resistencia sujetándolas a los costados.  El uso de muñequeras es una necesidad debido a la cantidad de pesas utilizadas.  Encuentro que esta es una variación excelente cuando mi espalda baja comienza a actuar mal después de muchas semanas de hacer sentadillas regulares con barra.  (Nota: para las sentadillas con mancuernas en posición amplia, tendrás que sujetar las mancuernas entre las piernas en lugar de ambos lados para poder distanciar las piernas lo suficiente).

Otra forma de realizarlos es utilizando un cinturón de pesas y colocándole pesas entre las piernas.  Esta variación se conoce como sentadillas con cinturón de pesas y debe realizarse con las piernas colocadas sobre dos plataformas bien aseguradas, elevadas pero separadas, que permiten que las pesas suban y bajen en el medio. Este ejercicio es una excelente opción para personas con problemas de espalda baja.  Sin embargo, el problema es encontrar las plataformas que cumplan los criterios.  La única forma en que he podido realizar esto es cuando tengo dos bancos colocados uno frente al otro con plataformas de observación enfrentadas.  Si acerca los bancos lo suficiente, podrá ejecutar las sentadillas con cinturón de pesas utilizando la plataforma de observación.

Por último, también puedes realizar sentadillas en una máquina Smith, aunque no lo recomiendo.  La razón para no realizar sentadillas regulares en la máquina Smith es que, dado que la máquina le permite ejecutar el ejercicio mientras se inclina contra la barra, se minimiza la participación de los flexores de la cadera, eliminando el isquiosurales del ejercicio.  Si bien esto elimina la presión sobre la espalda baja, la participación de los isquiosurales es un requisito para estabilizar la rótula.  Entonces, como resultado, lo que se crea es una situación en la que las fuerzas destructivas ejercen una enorme presión sobre el ligamento cruzado anterior (ligamento cruzado anterior; un ligamento primario en la cápsula de la rodilla cuyo trabajo es proporcionar estabilidad a la rodilla) al empujar la rótula hacia adelante.  Por esta razón, recomiendo encarecidamente no utilizar la máquina Smith para hacer sentadillas. Si aún así insistes en hacerlo, asegúrate de que sea un uso esporádico y no frecuente, y también asegúrate de controlar la cantidad de peso utilizada.

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start off in a press up position with your hands just wider than shoulder width and your toes being the only other point of contact with the floor. Your body should be suspended in a straight line from your heels to your shoulders above the floor. This will be your starting position.
Bring your right knee underneath your body so that it is as close to your chest as you can get it.
Exhale and swap your right leg for your left and as fast as you can.
Continue to alternate your legs and bring each knee in as close to your chest as possible. Tip: Take shallow breaths whilst you are performing the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Ab Bike or High Knees.

Bring your right knee underneath your body so that it is as close to your chest as you can get it.
Exhale and swap your right leg for your left and as fast as you can.
Continue to alternate your legs and bring each knee in as close to your chest as possible. Tip: Take shallow breaths whilst you are performing the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

es: Comience en una posición de flexión hacia arriba con las manos un poco más anchas que el ancho de los hombros y los dedos de los pies siendo el único otro punto de contacto con el suelo. Su cuerpo debe estar suspendido en línea recta desde los talones hasta los hombros por encima del suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Coloque la rodilla derecha debajo de su cuerpo para que quede lo más cerca posible de su pecho.
Exhala y cambia tu pierna derecha por la izquierda y lo más rápido que puedas.
Continúe alternando las piernas y acerque cada rodilla lo más posible al pecho. Consejo: respire superficialmente mientras realiza el movimiento.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Ab Bike o Rodillas Altas.

name: Scissor Lunges
instructions: Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.

As you exhale, you need to direct force through your quadriceps and glutes in order to drive your body upward and into a jumping motion. As you leave the floor you will reverse your stance by bringing your back leg forward and your front leg back.
As you land, you land into the next repetition by bending at your knees and hips to create right angles at the joints of your front leg, inhale as you do so.
Alternate in this manner and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Barbell Lunges.

en: quadriceps
es: cuádriceps

en: Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.

As you exhale, you need to direct force through your quadriceps and glutes in order to drive your body upward and into a jumping motion. As you leave the floor you will reverse your stance by bringing your back leg forward and your front leg back.
As you land, you land into the next repetition by bending at your knees and hips to create right angles at the joints of your front leg, inhale as you do so.
Alternate in this manner and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Barbell Lunges.
es: Da un paso hacia adelante (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer el cuerpo para crear dos ángulos rectos en las rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrese de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.

Mientras exhalas, debes dirigir la fuerza a través de los cuádriceps y los glúteos para impulsar tu cuerpo hacia arriba y realizar un movimiento de salto. Al levantarte del suelo, invertirás tu postura llevando la pierna trasera hacia adelante y la pierna delantera hacia atrás.
A medida que aterrizas, aterrizas en la siguiente repetición doblando las rodillas y las caderas para crear ángulos rectos en las articulaciones de la pierna delantera, inhala mientras lo haces.
Alterne de esta manera y repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: estocadas caminando con mancuernas o estocadas con barra.

name: Lateral Bounds
instructions: Assume a half squat position facing 90 degrees from your direction of travel. This will be your starting position.
Allow your lead leg to do a countermovement inward as you shift your weight to the outside leg.
Immediately push off and extend, attempting to bound to the side as far as possible.
Upon landing, immediately push off in the opposite direction, returning to your original start position.
Continue back and forth for several repetitions.

es: aductores

en: Assume a half squat position facing 90 degrees from your direction of travel. This will be your starting position.
Allow your lead leg to do a countermovement inward as you shift your weight to the outside leg.
Immediately push off and extend, attempting to bound to the side as far as possible.
Upon landing, immediately push off in the opposite direction, returning to your original start position.
Continue back and forth for several repetitions.
es: Asuma una posición de media sentadilla mirando a 90 grados desde su dirección de viaje. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Permita que su pierna adelantada haga un contramovimiento hacia adentro mientras cambia su peso hacia la pierna exterior.
Inmediatamente empújese y extiéndase, intentando saltar hacia un lado lo más lejos posible.
Al aterrizar, empújese inmediatamente en la dirección opuesta, regresando a su posición inicial original.
Continúe de ida y vuelta durante varias repeticiones.

name: Knee Tuck Jumps
instructions: Begin in a comfortable standing position with your knees slightly bent. Hold your hands in front of you, palms down with your fingertips together at chest height. This will be your starting position.
Rapidly dip down into a quarter squat and immediately explode upward. Drive the knees towards the chest, attempting to touch them to the palms of the hands.
Jump as high as you can, raising your knees up, and then ensure a good land be re-extending your legs, absorbing impact through be allowing the knees to rebend.

Rapidly dip down into a quarter squat and immediately explode upward. Drive the knees towards the chest, attempting to touch them to the palms of the hands.
Jump as high as you can, raising your knees up, and then ensure a good land be re-extending your legs, absorbing impact through be allowing the knees to rebend.
es: Comience en una posición cómoda de pie con las rodillas ligeramente flexionadas. Mantenga las manos frente a usted, con las palmas hacia abajo y las yemas de los dedos juntas a la altura del pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Sumérgete rápidamente en un cuarto de sentadilla e inmediatamente explota hacia arriba. Lleva las rodillas hacia el pecho, intentando tocarlas con las palmas de las manos.

Salta lo más alto que puedas, levanta las rodillas y luego asegúrate de hacer un buen aterrizaje volviendo a extender las piernas, absorbiendo el impacto permitiendo que las rodillas se doblen nuevamente.

name: Kneeling Squats
instructions: Set the bar to the proper height in a power rack. Kneel behind the bar; it may be beneficial to put a mat down to pad your knees. Slide under the bar, racking it across the back of your shoulders. Your shoulder blades should be retracted and the bar tight across your back. Unrack the weight.
With your head looking forward, sit back with your butt until you touch your calves.
Reverse the motion, returning the torso to an upright position.

en: glutes
es: glúteos

en: abdominals
hamstrings

With your head looking forward, sit back with your butt until you touch your calves.
Reverse the motion, returning the torso to an upright position.
es: Coloque la barra a la altura adecuada en una rejilla eléctrica. Arrodíllate detrás de la barra; Puede resultar beneficioso colocar una colchoneta para proteger las rodillas. Deslízate debajo de la barra, pasándola por la parte posterior de tus hombros. Los omóplatos deben estar retraídos y la barra apretada sobre la espalda. Destrabe el peso.
Con la cabeza mirando hacia adelante, siéntate hacia atrás con el trasero hasta tocar las gemelos.
Invierta el movimiento, devolviendo el torso a una posición vertical.

name: Reverse Grip Incline Press Ups
instructions: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your hands on the bar palms up, with your hands about shoulder width apart.
Position your feet back from the bar with arms and body straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lower your chest to the bar by bending the arms.
Return to the starting position by extending the elbows, pressing yourself back up.

en: chest
es: pecho

en: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your hands on the bar palms up, with your hands about shoulder width apart.
Position your feet back from the bar with arms and body straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lower your chest to the bar by bending the arms.
Return to the starting position by extending the elbows, pressing yourself back up.
es: Párese frente a la barra de una máquina Smith o a una plataforma elevada resistente a una altura adecuada.
Coloque las manos sobre la barra con las palmas hacia arriba, con las manos separadas aproximadamente al ancho de los hombros.
Coloque los pies alejados de la barra con los brazos y el cuerpo rectos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Manteniendo el cuerpo recto, baje el pecho hasta la barra doblando los brazos.
Regrese a la posición inicial extendiendo los codos, presionándose hacia arriba.

name: Narrow Grip Incline Press Ups
instructions: Stand facing a Smith machine bar or sturdy elevated platform at an appropriate height.
Place your hands next to one another on the bar.
Position your feet back from the bar with arms and body straight. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lower your chest to the bar by bending the arms.
Return to the starting position by extending the elbows, pressing yourself back up.

Coloque sus manos una al lado de la otra en la barra.
Coloque los pies alejados de la barra con los brazos y el cuerpo rectos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Manteniendo el cuerpo recto, baje el pecho hasta la barra doblando los brazos.
Regrese a la posición inicial extendiendo los codos, presionándose hacia arriba.

name: Incline Press Ups
instructions: Stand facing bench or sturdy elevated platform. Place hands on edge of bench or platform, slightly wider than shoulder width.
Position forefoot back from bench or platform with arms and body straight. Arms should be perpendicular to body. Keeping body straight, lower chest to edge of box or platform by bending arms.
Push body up until arms are extended. Repeat.

en: chest
es: pecho

en: shoulders

es: hombros
tríceps

en: Stand facing bench or sturdy elevated platform. Place hands on edge of bench or platform, slightly wider than shoulder width.
Position forefoot back from bench or platform with arms and body straight. Arms should be perpendicular to body. Keeping body straight, lower chest to edge of box or platform by bending arms.
Push body up until arms are extended. Repeat.
es: Párese frente a un banco o una plataforma elevada resistente. Coloque las manos en el borde del banco o plataforma, un poco más ancho que el ancho de los hombros.

Coloque el antepié hacia atrás desde un banco o plataforma con los brazos y el cuerpo rectos. Los brazos deben estar perpendiculares al cuerpo. Manteniendo el cuerpo recto, baje el pecho hasta el borde de la caja o plataforma doblando los brazos.
Empuje el cuerpo hacia arriba hasta que los brazos estén extendidos. Repetir.

name: Hyperextensions
instructions: With someone holding down your legs, slide yourself down to the edge a flat bench until your hips hang off the end of the bench. Tip: Your entire upper body should be hanging down towards the floor.   Also, you will be in the same position as if you were on a hyperextension bench but the range of motion will be shorter due to the height of the flat bench vs. that of the hyperextension bench.

With your body straight, cross your arms in front of you (my preference) or behind your head. This will be your starting position.  Tip: You can also hold a weight plate for extra resistance in front of you under your crossed arms.

Start bending forward slowly at the waist as far as you can while keeping your back flat.  Inhale as you perform this movement.  Keep moving forward until you almost touch the floor or you feel a nice stretch on the hamstrings (whichever comes first). Tip: Never round the back as you perform this exercise.

Slowly raise your torso back to the initial position as you exhale.  Tip: Avoid the temptation to arch your back past a straight line.  Also, do not swing the torso at any time in order to protect the back from injury.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: This exercise can also be performed using a hyperextension bench.  Also, a similar exercise to this one is the good morning and the stiff-legged deadlift.

en: lower back
es: zona lumbar

en: glutes
hamstrings
es: glúteos
isquiosurales

en: With someone holding down your legs, slide yourself down to the edge a flat bench until your hips hang off the end of the bench. Tip: Your entire upper body should be hanging down towards the floor.   Also, you will be in the same position as if you were on a hyperextension bench but the range of motion will be shorter due to the height of the flat bench vs. that of the hyperextension bench.

With your body straight, cross your arms in front of you (my preference) or behind your head. This will be your starting position.  Tip: You can also hold a weight plate for extra resistance in front of you under your crossed arms.

Start bending forward slowly at the waist as far as you can while keeping your back flat.  Inhale as you perform this movement.  Keep moving forward until you almost touch the floor or you feel a nice stretch on the hamstrings (whichever comes first). Tip: Never round the back as you perform this exercise.

Slowly raise your torso back to the initial position as you exhale.  Tip: Avoid the temptation to arch your back past a straight line.  Also, do not swing the torso at any time in order to protect the back from injury.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: This exercise can also be performed using a hyperextension bench.  Also, a similar exercise to this one is the good morning and the stiff-legged deadlift.
es: Con alguien que te sujete las piernas, deslízate hacia el borde de un banco plano hasta que tus caderas cuelguen del extremo del banco. Consejo: toda la parte superior del cuerpo debe colgar hacia el suelo.   Además, estarás en la misma posición que si estuvieras en un banco de hiperextensión, pero el rango de movimiento será más corto debido a la altura del banco plano frente a la del banco de hiperextensión.

Con el cuerpo recto, cruza los brazos delante de ti (mi preferencia) o detrás de la cabeza. Esta será tu posición inicial.  Consejo: También puedes sostener una placa de pesas para mayor resistencia frente a ti debajo de los brazos cruzados.

Comience a inclinarse hacia adelante lentamente desde la cintura lo más que pueda mientras mantiene la espalda plana.  Inhala mientras realizas este movimiento.  Sigue avanzando hasta que casi toques el suelo o sientas un agradable estiramiento en los isquiosurales (lo que ocurra primero). Consejo: nunca doble la espalda mientras realiza este ejercicio.

Levanta lentamente el torso hasta la posición inicial mientras exhalas.  Consejo: evite la tentación de arquear la espalda más allá de una línea recta.  Además, no balancee el torso en ningún momento para proteger la espalda de lesiones.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: este ejercicio también se puede realizar utilizando un banco de hiperextensión.  Además, un ejercicio similar a este es el de los buenos días y el peso muerto con las piernas rígidas.

name: Bodyweight Glute Kickbacks
instructions: Kneel on the floor or an exercise mat and bend at the waist with your arms extended in front of you (perpendicular to the torso) in order to get into a kneeling push-up position but with the arms spaced at shoulder width. Your head should be looking forward and the bend of the knees should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, lift up your right leg until the hamstrings are in line with the back while maintaining the 90-degree angle bend. Contract the glutes throughout this movement and hold the contraction at the top for a second.  Tip: At the end of the movement the upper leg should be parallel to the floor while the calf should be perpendicular to it.
Go back to the initial position as you inhale and now repeat with the left leg.
Continue to alternate legs until all of the recommended repetitions have been performed.
Variations:  For this exercise you can also perform all of the repetitions with one leg first and then the other one.  Additionally, you can also add ankle weights.

name.es: Contragolpes de glúteos con peso corporal

en: glutes
es: glúteos

en: hamstrings
es: isquiosurales

en: Kneel on the floor or an exercise mat and bend at the waist with your arms extended in front of you (perpendicular to the torso) in order to get into a kneeling push-up position but with the arms spaced at shoulder width. Your head should be looking forward and the bend of the knees should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. This will be your starting position.

As you exhale, lift up your right leg until the hamstrings are in line with the back while maintaining the 90-degree angle bend. Contract the glutes throughout this movement and hold the contraction at the top for a second.  Tip: At the end of the movement the upper leg should be parallel to the floor while the calf should be perpendicular to it.
Go back to the initial position as you inhale and now repeat with the left leg.
Continue to alternate legs until all of the recommended repetitions have been performed.
Variations:  For this exercise you can also perform all of the repetitions with one leg first and then the other one.  Additionally, you can also add ankle weights.
es: Arrodíllate en el suelo o en una colchoneta de ejercicios y dobla la cintura con los brazos extendidos frente a ti (perpendiculares al torso) para adoptar una posición de flexión de rodillas pero con los brazos espaciados al ancho de los hombros. Tu cabeza debe mirar hacia adelante y la flexión de las rodillas debe crear un ángulo de 90 grados entre los isquiosurales y las gemelos. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhala, levante la pierna derecha hasta que los isquiosurales estén alineados con la espalda mientras mantiene la curvatura en ángulo de 90 grados. Contrae los glúteos durante todo este movimiento y mantén la contracción en la parte superior durante un segundo.  Consejo: Al final del movimiento, la parte superior de la pierna debe estar paralela al suelo mientras que la pantorrilla debe estar perpendicular a él.
Vuelve a la posición inicial mientras inhalas y ahora repite con la pierna izquierda.
Continúe alternando piernas hasta haber realizado todas las repeticiones indicadas.
Variaciones: Para este ejercicio también puedes realizar todas las repeticiones con una pierna primero y luego la otra.  Además, también puedes añadir pesas en los tobillos.

name: Glute-Ham Raise
instructions: Place a step a few feet behind the lat pulldown machine which is the same height as the seat. Next kneel on the seat, facing the step and secure your heels under the pad. Your knees should be at a 90 degree angle, your hips pushed forward and your torso upright. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend your body towards the step in a slow and controlled manner. The tension should be put through your hamstrings. Tip: Maintain a straight torso throughout the movement. Keep your hips forward by squeezing your glutes. Continue to descend until your body is parallel with the floor and your body is supported by your hands on the step.

After a brief pause, exhale, push through your arms and pull through your hamstrings to return your body back along the same path into its starting position. Try to use your hamstrings as much as possible when doing this.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Leg Curls or Lying Hamstring Curls.

en: hamstrings
es: isquiosurales

en: calves

en: Place a step a few feet behind the lat pulldown machine which is the same height as the seat. Next kneel on the seat, facing the step and secure your heels under the pad. Your knees should be at a 90 degree angle, your hips pushed forward and your torso upright. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend your body towards the step in a slow and controlled manner. The tension should be put through your hamstrings. Tip: Maintain a straight torso throughout the movement. Keep your hips forward by squeezing your glutes. Continue to descend until your body is parallel with the floor and your body is supported by your hands on the step.

After a brief pause, exhale, push through your arms and pull through your hamstrings to return your body back along the same path into its starting position. Try to use your hamstrings as much as possible when doing this.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Leg Curls or Lying Hamstring Curls.
es: Coloque un escalón a unos pocos pies detrás de la máquina de jalones laterales que esté a la misma altura que el asiento. Luego arrodíllese en el asiento, de cara al escalón y asegure los talones debajo de la almohadilla. Tus rodillas deben estar en un ángulo de 90 grados, tus caderas hacia adelante y tu torso erguido. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y desciende tu cuerpo hacia el escalón de forma lenta y controlada. La tensión debe pasar a través de los isquiosurales. Consejo: Mantenga el torso recto durante todo el movimiento. Mantenga las caderas hacia adelante apretando los glúteos. Continúe descendiendo hasta que su cuerpo quede paralelo al piso y su cuerpo esté apoyado con sus manos en el escalón.

Después de una breve pausa, exhale, empuje con los brazos y tire de los isquiosurales para que su cuerpo regrese por el mismo camino a su posición inicial. Intente utilizar los isquiosurales tanto como sea posible al hacer esto.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de piernas sentado o Curl de isquiosurales acostado.

name: Gironda Sternum Chins
instructions: Grasp the pull-up bar with a shoulder width underhand grip.
Now hang with your arms fully extended and stick your chest out and lean back.  Tip: You will be leaning back throughout the entire movement. This will be your starting position.

Start pulling yourself towards the bar with your spine arched throughout the movement and your head leaning back as far away from the bar as possible.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: At the upper end of the movement, your hips and legs will be at about a 45-degree angle to the floor.

Keep pulling until your collarbone passes the bar and your lower chest or sternum area touches it. Hold that contraction for a second.  Tip: By the time you've completed this portion of the movement; your head will be parallel to the floor.
Slowly start going back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: You can perform this movement using a chin-assist machine if unable to do it without aid or have a spotter help you up.  You can also use the pull-down machine instead even though due to the fact that the pull-down machine does not involve a lot of the stabilizer muscles needed for the chin-up, the exercise becomes less effective.  Also, as you get more advanced, you can use a weight belt to increase resistance.

en: lats

en: Grasp the pull-up bar with a shoulder width underhand grip.
Now hang with your arms fully extended and stick your chest out and lean back.  Tip: You will be leaning back throughout the entire movement. This will be your starting position.

Start pulling yourself towards the bar with your spine arched throughout the movement and your head leaning back as far away from the bar as possible.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: At the upper end of the movement, your hips and legs will be at about a 45-degree angle to the floor.

Keep pulling until your collarbone passes the bar and your lower chest or sternum area touches it. Hold that contraction for a second.  Tip: By the time you've completed this portion of the movement; your head will be parallel to the floor.
Slowly start going back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: You can perform this movement using a chin-assist machine if unable to do it without aid or have a spotter help you up.  You can also use the pull-down machine instead even though due to the fact that the pull-down machine does not involve a lot of the stabilizer muscles needed for the chin-up, the exercise becomes less effective.  Also, as you get more advanced, you can use a weight belt to increase resistance.
es: Sujete la barra de dominadas con un agarre por debajo del ancho de los hombros.
Ahora cuelga con los brazos completamente extendidos, saca el pecho e inclínate hacia atrás.  Consejo: Te inclinarás hacia atrás durante todo el movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Comienza a tirar hacia la barra con la columna arqueada durante todo el movimiento y la cabeza inclinada hacia atrás lo más lejos posible de la barra.  Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.  Consejo: en el extremo superior del movimiento, las caderas y las piernas estarán en un ángulo de aproximadamente 45 grados con respecto al suelo.

Continúe tirando hasta que su clavícula pase la barra y la parte inferior del pecho o el área del esternón la toque. Mantén esa contracción por un segundo.  Consejo: cuando hayas completado esta parte del movimiento; tu cabeza quedará paralela al suelo.
Comience a regresar lentamente a la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

Variaciones: puedes realizar este movimiento usando una máquina de ayuda para la barbilla si no puedes hacerlo sin ayuda o si un observador te ayuda a levantarte.  También puedes utilizar la máquina de dominadas, aunque debido a que la máquina de dominadas no involucra muchos de los músculos estabilizadores necesarios para las dominadas, el ejercicio se vuelve menos efectivo.  Además, a medida que avances, puedes utilizar un cinturón de pesas para aumentar la resistencia.

name: Bodyweight Box Jumps
instructions: Begin with a box or bench 1-2 feet in front of you. Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a short squat in preparation for the jump; swing your arms behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your arms forward and up.
Jump over the bench, landing with the knees bent, absorbing the impact through the legs.
Turn around and face the opposite direction, then jump back over the bench.

name.es: Saltos de caja con peso corporal

es: cuádriceps

en: Begin with a box or bench 1-2 feet in front of you. Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a short squat in preparation for the jump; swing your arms behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your arms forward and up.
Jump over the bench, landing with the knees bent, absorbing the impact through the legs.
Turn around and face the opposite direction, then jump back over the bench.
es: Comience con una caja o banco a 1 o 2 pies frente a usted. Párese con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Realiza una sentadilla corta como preparación para el salto; mueve los brazos detrás de ti.
Rebota fuera de esta posición, extendiéndote por las caderas, las rodillas y los tobillos para saltar lo más alto posible. Mueva los brazos hacia adelante y hacia arriba.
Salta sobre el banco aterrizando con las rodillas flexionadas, absorbiendo el impacto a través de las piernas.
Date la vuelta y mira en la dirección opuesta, luego salta sobre el banco.

name: Bodyweight Squat Jumps
instructions: Stand with a slightly wider than shoulder width stance, toes pointing (slightly) outward with your back straight and chest out.
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain good posture. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. Extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Kettlebell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.

name.es: Saltos en cuclillas con peso corporal

en: quadriceps
es: cuádriceps

en: Stand with a slightly wider than shoulder width stance, toes pointing (slightly) outward with your back straight and chest out.
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain good posture. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. Extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Kettlebell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.
es: Párese con una postura ligeramente más ancha que el ancho de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando (ligeramente) hacia afuera con la espalda recta y el pecho hacia afuera.
Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y mantener una buena postura. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas y las caderas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, exhala y empuja con fuerza los talones para impulsar las caderas hacia adelante. Extiende las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo para saltar lo más alto que puedas antes de aterrizar en tu siguiente repetición.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con salto con pesa rusa o sentadillas con salto con barra.

name: Reverse Bodyweight Lunges Front Foot Elevated
instructions: Position a bar onto a rack at shoulder height loaded to an appropriate weight. Place a short, raised platform behind you.
Rack the bar onto your upper back, keeping your back arched and tight. Step onto your raised platform with both feet. This will be your starting position.
Begin by stepping backwards with one leg. Descend by flexing your hips and knees until your knee touches the floor.
Pause, and extend through the hips and knees to rise up, returning all the way to the starting position before alternating.

name.en: Reverse Bodyweight Lunges Front Foot Elevated
name.es: Estocadas inversas con peso corporal y pie delantero elevado

en: Position a bar onto a rack at shoulder height loaded to an appropriate weight. Place a short, raised platform behind you.
Rack the bar onto your upper back, keeping your back arched and tight. Step onto your raised platform with both feet. This will be your starting position.
Begin by stepping backwards with one leg. Descend by flexing your hips and knees until your knee touches the floor.
Pause, and extend through the hips and knees to rise up, returning all the way to the starting position before alternating.
es: Coloque una barra sobre una rejilla a la altura de los hombros cargada con un peso adecuado. Coloque una plataforma corta y elevada detrás de usted.
Coloque la barra en la parte superior de la espalda, manteniendo la espalda arqueada y tensa. Sube a tu plataforma elevada con ambos pies. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comience dando un paso hacia atrás con una pierna. Desciende flexionando la cadera y las rodillas hasta que la rodilla toque el suelo.
Haga una pausa y extiéndase a través de las caderas y las rodillas para levantarse, regresando completamente a la posición inicial antes de alternar.

aliases: Reverse Bodyweight Lunges Front Foot Elevated

name: Bodyweight Depth Jumps
instructions: For this drill you will need two boxes or benches, one 12 to 16 inches high and the other 22 to 26 inches high.

Stand on one of the two boxes with arms at the sides; feet should be together and slightly off the edge as in the depth jump. Place the other box approximately two or three feet in front of and facing the performer.
Begin by dropping off the initial box, landing and simultaneously taking off with both feet.
Rebound by driving upward and outward as intensely as possible, using the arms and full extension of the body to jump onto the higher box. Again, allow the legs to absorb the impact.

name.es: Saltos de profundidad con peso corporal

Stand on one of the two boxes with arms at the sides; feet should be together and slightly off the edge as in the depth jump. Place the other box approximately two or three feet in front of and facing the performer.
Begin by dropping off the initial box, landing and simultaneously taking off with both feet.

es: Para este ejercicio necesitarás dos cajas o bancos, uno de 12 a 16 pulgadas de alto y el otro de 22 a 26 pulgadas de alto.

Párate sobre una de las dos cajas con los brazos a los lados; Los pies deben estar juntos y ligeramente fuera del borde como en el salto de profundidad. Coloque la otra caja aproximadamente dos o tres pies delante y de cara al artista.
Comienza dejando caer la caja inicial, aterrizando y despegando simultáneamente con ambos pies.

Rebote impulsando hacia arriba y hacia afuera lo más intensamente posible, usando los brazos y la extensión completa del cuerpo para saltar a la caja más alta. Nuevamente, permita que las piernas absorban el impacto.

name: Decline Press Ups
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down just in front of a ledge or platform and lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now you should come up onto your feet by stepping up onto the ledge or platform behind you so that your body is suspended above the floor. The only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and the platform itself. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor, under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the floor whilst flaring your elbows out wide. Continue to descend until you are only a few inches from the floor.

Pause for a brief movement, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Press Ups or Barbell Incline Bench Press - Medium Grip.
