es: Para comenzar este ejercicio, arrodíllate justo frente a una repisa o plataforma e inclínate hacia adelante de modo que ahora quedes con el peso al descubierto en tus brazos. Coloque sus manos justo afuera de donde estaría su pecho. Ahora debes ponerte de pie subiendo a la repisa o plataforma detrás de ti para que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el piso. Los únicos puntos de contacto (con el suelo) deben ser tus manos y la propia plataforma. Tu cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y tus brazos perpendiculares al suelo, debajo del pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, baje lentamente el pecho hacia el suelo mientras abre los codos. Continúe descendiendo hasta que esté a sólo unos centímetros del suelo.

Haga una pausa para un breve movimiento, exhale y presione con las palmas para que su cuerpo regrese por el mismo camino a la posición inicial. Consejo: apriete los músculos pectorales mientras lo hace y cuando llegue a la cima del movimiento, no bloquee los codos.
Repita el movimiento durante la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: flexiones o Press de banca inclinado con barra - Agarre medio.

name: Crucifix
instructions: The crucifix is a static hold. Position yourself lying face down on the floor with your legs together and arms reaching out as wide as you can.
Next, engage your core and using your hands/fingers, suspend your body off the floor by a few inches and hold.
Continue to breathe as naturally as possible and hold for the prescribed amount of time.

en: shoulders

en: The crucifix is a static hold. Position yourself lying face down on the floor with your legs together and arms reaching out as wide as you can.
Next, engage your core and using your hands/fingers, suspend your body off the floor by a few inches and hold.
Continue to breathe as naturally as possible and hold for the prescribed amount of time.
es: El crucifijo es una sujeción estática. Colóquese boca abajo en el suelo con las piernas juntas y los brazos extendidos lo más que pueda.
Luego, involucre su núcleo y, usando sus manos/dedos, suspenda su cuerpo del piso unos centímetros y sostenga.
Continúe respirando de la forma más natural posible y manténgala así durante el tiempo prescrito.

name: Alternating Bodyweight Curtsy Squats
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping back with one foot and flexing the hips and front knee. As you do so, rotate your torso across the front leg.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position and repeat on the other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.

name.es: Sentadillas con reverencias alternas con peso corporal

en: abdominals

en: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a rear lunge by stepping back with one foot and flexing the hips and front knee. As you do so, rotate your torso across the front leg.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position and repeat on the other side, continuing in an alternating fashion.
es: Párese con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Realice una estocada trasera dando un paso atrás con un pie y flexionando las caderas y la rodilla delantera. Mientras lo hace, gire el torso sobre la pierna delantera.
Después de una breve pausa, regresa a la posición inicial y repite del otro lado, continuando de forma alterna.

name: Chin Ups
instructions: Take hold of a pull up bar with a shoulder width, underhand grip (palms facing towards you). After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your palms as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back. Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as you can get it.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Underhand Cable Pulldowns or Horizontal Barbell Pull Ups.

es: Sujete una barra de dominadas con un agarre al ancho de los hombros y con las palmas hacia usted. Después de haber agarrado firmemente las manijas, levante los pies del piso para que su cuerpo cuelgue de su agarre. Tire de los talones hacia los glúteos para que las rodillas queden dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados y las caderas empujadas hacia adelante. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar este movimiento, exhale y tire del torso hacia las palmas mientras contrae los bíceps y los músculos de la espalda. Continúe levantándose hasta que su pecho esté lo más alto que pueda.
Después de una breve pausa, regrese el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: dominadas con cable por debajo o dominadas horizontales con barra.

name: Bodyweight Bridges
instructions: Grab a mat and lay down on your back (face up). Have your torso flat on the floor with your arms by your sides. Your feet should be planted on the floor with your knees bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your heels to lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes. As you do so, lean back onto your shoulders and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted.

After a brief pause, inhale and gently relax your glutes to drop your pelvis towards the floor (the resistance should be placed through your heels). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glutes touch the floor.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Stability Ball Hip Bridge or Barbell Hip Thrust.

en: glutes
es: glúteos

en: hamstrings

en: Grab a mat and lay down on your back (face up). Have your torso flat on the floor with your arms by your sides. Your feet should be planted on the floor with your knees bent at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your heels to lift your hips toward the ceiling by squeezing your glutes. As you do so, lean back onto your shoulders and keep driving upward until your glutes are fully contracted.

After a brief pause, inhale and gently relax your glutes to drop your pelvis towards the floor (the resistance should be placed through your heels). Continue to drop your pelvis until your glutes touch the floor.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Stability Ball Hip Bridge or Barbell Hip Thrust.
es: Coge una colchoneta y acuéstate boca arriba (boca arriba). Mantenga el torso apoyado en el suelo con los brazos a los lados. Los pies deben estar plantados en el suelo con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo agudo (menos de 90 grados). Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y conduce con los talones para levantar las caderas hacia el techo apretando los glúteos. Mientras lo hace, inclínese hacia atrás sobre los hombros y siga subiendo hasta que los glúteos estén completamente contraídos.

Después de una breve pausa, inhala y relaja suavemente los glúteos para dejar caer la pelvis hacia el suelo (la resistencia debe colocarse a través de los talones). Continúe bajando la pelvis hasta que los glúteos toquen el suelo.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: puente de cadera con pelota de estabilidad o empuje de cadera con barra.

name: Bodyweight Box Squats
instructions: Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward just in front of a box. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your glutes gently touch the box.

After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back into its starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats To A Bench or Barbell Squats To A Box.

en: Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward just in front of a box. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your glutes gently touch the box.

After a brief pause, exhale and return your torso back into its starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads and glutes to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats To A Bench or Barbell Squats To A Box.
es: Adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros con los dedos de los pies ligeramente apuntando hacia afuera, justo en frente de una caja. Mantenga la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento y mantenga la cabeza erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y comienza a descender doblando las rodillas y las caderas. Su peso debe colocarse predominantemente a través de los talones mientras se sienta hacia atrás en el movimiento hasta que sus glúteos toquen suavemente la caja.

Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa el torso a su posición inicial siguiendo el mismo camino, empuja los talones con la fuerza impulsada a través de los cuádriceps y los glúteos para hacerlo. Párese firme con las piernas completamente extendidas, la espalda recta y los hombros relajados.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con mancuernas en un banco o sentadillas con barra en una caja.

name: Bodyweight Walking Lunges
instructions: Adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms in a comfortable position that will not aid in the movement. This will be your starting position.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, push off the floor with your rear foot to return your body into a standing position.
Alternate legs as you go (as you walk forwards) and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Barbell Walking Lunges.

en: Adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms in a comfortable position that will not aid in the movement. This will be your starting position.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, push off the floor with your rear foot to return your body into a standing position.
Alternate legs as you go (as you walk forwards) and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Barbell Walking Lunges.
es: Adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros con los brazos en una posición cómoda que no ayude en el movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Da un paso hacia adelante (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer el cuerpo para crear dos ángulos rectos en las rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrese de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhala, empuje el suelo con el pie trasero para que el cuerpo vuelva a la posición de pie.
Alterne las piernas a medida que avanza (mientras camina hacia adelante) y repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: estocadas caminando con mancuernas o estocadas caminando con barra.

name: Body Tricep Press
instructions: Position a smith machine bar at chest height and make sure it is secure. Take a big step backwards and lean forward so that you take an overhand (palms facing away from you), shoulder width grip of the bar. Your feet should be together with a slight bend at your knees. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, inhale and lean your bodyweight forwards and allow your elbows to bend. Keep them as close to yours ears as possible as your torso and head are slowly brought under the bar. Continue to lean forward until your elbows are at an acute angle (under 90 degrees).
After a brief pause, exhale and press your torso and head back to their starting position along the same path whilst squeezing your triceps.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Extensions (Rope) or Dips - Triceps Version.

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: Position a smith machine bar at chest height and make sure it is secure. Take a big step backwards and lean forward so that you take an overhand (palms facing away from you), shoulder width grip of the bar. Your feet should be together with a slight bend at your knees. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, inhale and lean your bodyweight forwards and allow your elbows to bend. Keep them as close to yours ears as possible as your torso and head are slowly brought under the bar. Continue to lean forward until your elbows are at an acute angle (under 90 degrees).
After a brief pause, exhale and press your torso and head back to their starting position along the same path whilst squeezing your triceps.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Extensions (Rope) or Dips - Triceps Version.
es: Coloque una barra de máquina Smith a la altura del pecho y asegúrese de que esté segura. Da un gran paso hacia atrás e inclínate hacia adelante para tomar un agarre de la barra por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia afuera), a la altura de los hombros. Tus pies deben estar juntos con una ligera flexión en las rodillas. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta durante todo este movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar este movimiento, inhale e incline el peso de su cuerpo hacia adelante y permita que los codos se doblen. Manténgalos lo más cerca posible de sus oídos mientras su torso y cabeza se colocan lentamente debajo de la barra. Continúe inclinándose hacia adelante hasta que los codos formen un ángulo agudo (menos de 90 grados).
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona tu torso y regresa a su posición inicial por el mismo camino mientras aprietas tus tríceps.
Repita el movimiento durante la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Extensiones de Tríceps (Cuerda) o Fondos - Versión Tríceps.

name: Bent Knee Hip Raises
instructions: Lay down on a mat (face up) with your knees bent to a 90 degree angle (feet still on the floor) with your arms placed beside your torso. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and use your lower abs to lift your feet up and off the floor and contract your knees in towards your chest (maintain the bend at your knees throughout the movement).
Once your abs are as tight as they can be, inhale and return your knees back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Reverse Crunches.

name.es: Elevaciones de cadera con rodilla doblada

en: abdominals
es: abdominales

en: Lay down on a mat (face up) with your knees bent to a 90 degree angle (feet still on the floor) with your arms placed beside your torso. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and use your lower abs to lift your feet up and off the floor and contract your knees in towards your chest (maintain the bend at your knees throughout the movement).
Once your abs are as tight as they can be, inhale and return your knees back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cocoons or Reverse Crunches.
es: Acuéstese sobre una colchoneta (boca arriba) con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados (los pies todavía en el suelo) y los brazos colocados al lado del torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Exhale y use sus abdominales inferiores para levantar los pies del piso y contraer las rodillas hacia el pecho (mantenga las rodillas dobladas durante todo el movimiento).
Una vez que tus abdominales estén lo más tensos posible, inhala y regresa las rodillas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variación: Capullos o Crujidos Inversos.

name: Bench Dips
instructions: Place your hands just wider than shoulder width on the side of a bench and elevate your feet onto a parallel bench. Your legs should be straight with your hips at a 90 degree angle suspended off the floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate this movement, inhale and descend your pelvis towards the floor through gently bending your elbows until they create a 90 degree angle.
Pause for a brief moment in this position, then exhale and flex your triceps to extend your elbows, returning your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Narrow Grip Bench Press or Tricep Rope Extension.

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: chest
shoulders
es: pecho
hombros

en: Place your hands just wider than shoulder width on the side of a bench and elevate your feet onto a parallel bench. Your legs should be straight with your hips at a 90 degree angle suspended off the floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate this movement, inhale and descend your pelvis towards the floor through gently bending your elbows until they create a 90 degree angle.
Pause for a brief moment in this position, then exhale and flex your triceps to extend your elbows, returning your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Narrow Grip Bench Press or Tricep Rope Extension.
es: Coloque las manos un poco más anchas que el ancho de los hombros al costado de un banco y levante los pies sobre un banco paralelo. Tus piernas deben estar rectas con las caderas en un ángulo de 90 grados suspendidas del suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar este movimiento, inhale y descienda la pelvis hacia el suelo doblando suavemente los codos hasta crear un ángulo de 90 grados.
Haga una pausa por un breve momento en esta posición, luego exhale y flexione los tríceps para extender los codos, regresando el torso por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con agarre estrecho o extensión de cuerda para tríceps.

name: Backward Drag
instructions: Load a sled with the desired weight, attaching a rope or straps to the sled that you can hold onto.
Begin the exercise by moving backwards for a given distance. Leaning back, extend through the legs for short steps to move as quickly as possible.

en: quadriceps
es: cuádriceps

en: calves
forearms
glutes
hamstrings
lower back
es: gemelos
antebrazos

zona lumbar

en: Load a sled with the desired weight, attaching a rope or straps to the sled that you can hold onto.
Begin the exercise by moving backwards for a given distance. Leaning back, extend through the legs for short steps to move as quickly as possible.
es: Carga un trineo con el peso deseado, fijando al trineo una cuerda o correas a las que puedas sujetarte.
Comience el ejercicio moviéndose hacia atrás una distancia determinada. Inclinándose hacia atrás, extienda las piernas dando pasos cortos para moverse lo más rápido posible.

name: Ankle Circles
instructions: Adopt either a standing or seated stance with your torso supported. This will be your starting position.
Lift your right foot a couple of inches off the floor and draw a big circle with your big toe.
Continue in this fashion until you have completed the required amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: calves
es: gemelos

en: Adopt either a standing or seated stance with your torso supported. This will be your starting position.
Lift your right foot a couple of inches off the floor and draw a big circle with your big toe.
Continue in this fashion until you have completed the required amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Adopte una postura de pie o sentado con el torso apoyado. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Levante el pie derecho unos centímetros del suelo y dibuje un círculo grande con el dedo gordo.
Continúe de esta manera hasta que haya completado la cantidad requerida de repeticiones y cambie de lado.

name: Bodyweight Squats
instructions: Adopt a wide standing stance with your hands behind your head, elbows relaxed out wide. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips to descend your pelvis either in line or just past your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout and maintain good posture.
Once you get to the bottom of the movement, exhale and press through your heels to extend your hip and knee joints, elevating your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Barbell Squats.

en: quadriceps
es: cuádriceps

en: glutes
hamstrings
es: glúteos
isquiosurales

en: Adopt a wide standing stance with your hands behind your head, elbows relaxed out wide. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips to descend your pelvis either in line or just past your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout and maintain good posture.
Once you get to the bottom of the movement, exhale and press through your heels to extend your hip and knee joints, elevating your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Barbell Squats.
es: Adopte una postura amplia de pie con las manos detrás de la cabeza y los codos completamente relajados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y doble las rodillas y las caderas para descender la pelvis, ya sea en línea o justo por encima de las rodillas. Consejo: Mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento y mantenga una buena postura.

Una vez que llegue al final del movimiento, exhale y presione con los talones para extender las articulaciones de la cadera y la rodilla, elevando el torso hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con mancuernas o sentadillas con barra.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step to split your stance and descend so that your back knee is a couple of inches of the floor. This is your starting position.
Lean forward so that your bodyweight is being driven onto your front foot and towards the floor through the extension of your pelvis. Hold this position for around 10-20 seconds.
Next, lean your torso forward and place your elbow on the inside of your front knee so you can feel a stretch through your groin. Hold this position for around 10-20 seconds.

The final movement is to bring your back foot forward so you still have a slight split stance. Straighten out your front leg, lift your toes up and keep your torso as close to your knee as possible. Your back knee should be bent with your hands placed on the ankle of your front leg. Hold this position for around 10-20 seconds.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

name.es: El tramo más grande del mundo

en: hamstrings
es: isquiosurales

en: calves
glutes
quadriceps
es: gemelos
glúteos
cuádriceps

en: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step to split your stance and descend so that your back knee is a couple of inches of the floor. This is your starting position.
Lean forward so that your bodyweight is being driven onto your front foot and towards the floor through the extension of your pelvis. Hold this position for around 10-20 seconds.
Next, lean your torso forward and place your elbow on the inside of your front knee so you can feel a stretch through your groin. Hold this position for around 10-20 seconds.

The final movement is to bring your back foot forward so you still have a slight split stance. Straighten out your front leg, lift your toes up and keep your torso as close to your knee as possible. Your back knee should be bent with your hands placed on the ankle of your front leg. Hold this position for around 10-20 seconds.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Para llegar a la posición inicial de este estiramiento, debes caer hasta el final de una posición de estocada. Entonces, da un gran paso para dividir tu postura y desciende de modo que tu rodilla trasera esté a unos centímetros del suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Inclínese hacia adelante de modo que el peso de su cuerpo pase hacia el pie delantero y hacia el suelo a través de la extensión de la pelvis. Mantenga esta posición durante unos 10-20 segundos.
Luego, incline el torso hacia adelante y coloque el codo en el interior de la rodilla delantera para que pueda sentir un estiramiento en la ingle. Mantenga esta posición durante unos 10-20 segundos.

El movimiento final es llevar el pie trasero hacia adelante para mantener una postura ligeramente dividida. Estire la pierna delantera, levante los dedos de los pies y mantenga el torso lo más cerca posible de la rodilla. La rodilla trasera debe estar doblada con las manos colocadas en el tobillo de la pierna delantera. Mantenga esta posición durante unos 10-20 segundos.
Repita la número indicado de repeticiones y cambie de lado.

name: Windmills
instructions: Stand upright with your arms fully extended beside you. This will be your starting position.
Start the movement by rotating your right arm (from your shoulder joint) in a 360 degree motion.
When your arm is vertical from the floor, initiate the same movement but with your left arm. Complete 10-15 full rotations before coming to a halt.

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Stand upright with your arms fully extended beside you. This will be your starting position.
Start the movement by rotating your right arm (from your shoulder joint) in a 360 degree motion.
When your arm is vertical from the floor, initiate the same movement but with your left arm. Complete 10-15 full rotations before coming to a halt.
es: Párate erguido con los brazos completamente extendidos a tu lado. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comience el movimiento girando su brazo derecho (desde la articulación del hombro) en un movimiento de 360 ​​grados.
Cuando tu brazo esté vertical desde el suelo, inicia el mismo movimiento pero con tu brazo izquierdo. Complete de 10 a 15 rotaciones completas antes de detenerse.

name: Standing Hip Circles
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.

Elevate your right knee in front of your body until it is at 90 degrees. Next, rotate at your pelvis to bring your knee out wide and back down into the starting position. Tip: Try to create a circular motion as you go.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: abductors
es: abductores

en: adductors
es: aductores

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.

Elevate your right knee in front of your body until it is at 90 degrees. Next, rotate at your pelvis to bring your knee out wide and back down into the starting position. Tip: Try to create a circular motion as you go.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, anchura de hombros postura con tu torso erguido.

Eleva tu derecho rodilla delante de tu cuerpo hasta que it is at 90 degrees. A continuación, rota at tu pelvis to lleva tu rodilla out amplio and espalda down into la posición inicial. Consejo: Intenta create a movimiento circular durante el movimiento.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Shoulder Circles
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your shoulders relaxed and arms hanging by your sides.
Gently roll yours shoulders up, front, down, and back so you create circles.
Conitinue in this fashion until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: traps
es: trapecios

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your shoulders relaxed and arms hanging by your sides.
Gently roll yours shoulders up, front, down, and back so you create circles.
Conitinue in this fashion until you complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, anchura de hombros postura con tu hombros relajado and brazos hanging by tu lados.
Gently roll yours hombros up, delantero, down, and espalda so create circles.
Conitinue in this fashion hasta que complete the número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Foam Roll Piriformis
instructions: Take a seat on the floor with a foam roller placed underneath your glutes. Have your right leg (slightly bent) out in front of you with your left ankle resting on top of your right knee. have your left hand on the floor behind you for support. This will be your starting position.
Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller so that you put pressure through your glutes and release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: glutes
es: glúteos

en: Take a seat on the floor with a foam roller placed underneath your glutes. Have your right leg (slightly bent) out in front of you with your left ankle resting on top of your right knee. have your left hand on the floor behind you for support. This will be your starting position.
Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller so that you put pressure through your glutes and release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Siéntate on el suelo with a foam roller colocad debajo de tu glúteos. Have tu derecho pierna (slightly bent) extendidas delante de con tu izquierdo tobillo resting on parte superior of tu derecho rodilla. have tu izquierdo mano on el suelo detrás de for support. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Roll tu cuerpo espalda and hacia delante on the foam roller so that put pressure through tu glúteos and release any tensión may have.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.

name: Foam Roll Peroneals
instructions: Lay on the floor, on your left side, with a foam roller underneath your outer calf. Have both your legs straight, stacked one on top of another. Support your upper body by placing your hands on the floor. This will be your starting position.
Lift your hips up and off the floor and put as much pressure down into your outer calf as you possibly can. Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller to release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: calves
es: gemelos

en: Lay on the floor, on your left side, with a foam roller underneath your outer calf. Have both your legs straight, stacked one on top of another. Support your upper body by placing your hands on the floor. This will be your starting position.
Lift your hips up and off the floor and put as much pressure down into your outer calf as you possibly can. Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller to release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on el suelo, on tu izquierdo lado, with a foam roller debajo de tu outer gemelo. Have both tu piernas recto, stacked one on parte superior of another. Support tu upper cuerpo by placing tu manos on el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Eleva tu caderas up and off el suelo and put as much pressure down into tu outer gemelo as possibly puedas. Roll tu cuerpo espalda and hacia delante on the foam roller to release any tensión may have.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.

name: Foam Roll Latissimus Dorsi
instructions: Lay on a mat, on your left side, with your arms crossed infront of your body and a foam roller placed just below your arm pit. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, put as much of your bodyweight as you can down through the roller as you gently rock your body upward and back, releasing any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: lats
es: dorsales

en: Lay on a mat, on your left side, with your arms crossed infront of your body and a foam roller placed just below your arm pit. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, put as much of your bodyweight as you can down through the roller as you gently rock your body upward and back, releasing any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta, on tu izquierdo lado, con tu brazos crossed indelantero of tu cuerpo and a foam roller colocad just below tu brazo pit. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, put as much of tu peso corporal as can down through the roller as suavemente rock tu cuerpo arriba and espalda, releasing any tensión may have.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.

name: Foam Roll Iliotibial Band
instructions: Lay on the floor on your left side with a foam roller underneath your left thigh. Have your left leg extended out straight with your right leg bent over the top with the foot planted on the floor in front of your left thigh. Have your left hand on the floor for support (you can have both if needed). This will be your starting position.

Lift your hips up and off the floor and put as much pressure down into the side of your left thigh as you possibly can. Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller to release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: abductors
es: abductores

en: Lay on the floor on your left side with a foam roller underneath your left thigh. Have your left leg extended out straight with your right leg bent over the top with the foot planted on the floor in front of your left thigh. Have your left hand on the floor for support (you can have both if needed). This will be your starting position.

Lift your hips up and off the floor and put as much pressure down into the side of your left thigh as you possibly can. Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller to release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on el suelo on tu izquierdo lado with a foam roller debajo de tu izquierdo thigh. Have tu izquierdo pierna extiendeed out recto con tu derecho pierna bent over the parte superior with the pie planted on el suelo delante de tu izquierdo thigh. Have tu izquierdo mano on el suelo for support ( can have both if needed). Esta será tu posición inicial.

Eleva tu caderas up and off el suelo and put as much pressure down into the lado of tu izquierdo thigh as possibly puedas. Roll tu cuerpo espalda and hacia delante on the foam roller to release any tensión may have.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.

name: Hip Crossovers
instructions: Lay on a mat, on your back with your arms extended out to your sides with your palms facing the floor. Lift your feet off the floor by creating a 90 degree bend at your knees and hips. Tip: Keep your knees together throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and allow your knees to descend towards the left hand side until they are a few inches from the floor.
Next, exhale and use your core muscles to bring your lower body back along the same path into the starting position.
Pause for a brief moment and repeat the movement towards the right hand side.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: lower back
es: zona lumbar

en: abductors
es: abductores

en: Lay on a mat, on your back with your arms extended out to your sides with your palms facing the floor. Lift your feet off the floor by creating a 90 degree bend at your knees and hips. Tip: Keep your knees together throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and allow your knees to descend towards the left hand side until they are a few inches from the floor.
Next, exhale and use your core muscles to bring your lower body back along the same path into the starting position.
Pause for a brief moment and repeat the movement towards the right hand side.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta, on tu espalda con tu brazos extiendeed out to tu lados con tu palmas facing el suelo. Eleva tu pies off el suelo by creating a 90 degree flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas. Consejo: Mantén tu rodillas together durante todo this movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and permite tu rodillas to desciende hacia the izquierdo mano lado hasta que they are a few inches from el suelo.
A continuación, exhala and use tu core muscles to lleva tu baja cuerpo espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Haz una pausa for a brief moment and repeat the movimiento hacia the derecho mano lado.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Prone Hip Circles
instructions: Adopt an 'all fours' position on a mat. This will be your starting position.

Maintaining the 90 degree bend at your knee, lift your right knee off the mat and attempt to make a circle motion from your hip joint by extending out wide and round. As you stretch your way through the movement, press your heel away so that eventually your leg is fully extended behind your body.
Next, tuck your knee underneath your body in towards your chest and start again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions then swap sides.

en: abductors
es: abductores

en: adductors
es: aductores

en: Adopt an 'all fours' position on a mat. This will be your starting position.

Maintaining the 90 degree bend at your knee, lift your right knee off the mat and attempt to make a circle motion from your hip joint by extending out wide and round. As you stretch your way through the movement, press your heel away so that eventually your leg is fully extended behind your body.
Next, tuck your knee underneath your body in towards your chest and start again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions then swap sides.
es: Adopta unan 'all fours' posición on a colchoneta. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manténing the 90 degree flexiona at tu rodilla, eleva tu derecho rodilla off the colchoneta and attempt to make a circle motion from tu cadera joint by extiendeing out amplio and round. As estiramiento tu way through the movimiento, press tu talón away so that eventually tu pierna is completamente extiendeed detrás de tu cuerpo.
A continuación, tuck tu rodilla debajo de tu cuerpo in hacia tu pecho and start again.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones then swap lados.

name: Hanging Lat Stretch
instructions: Take hold of a chin up bar with an overhand grip, straight arm and allow the majority of your body weight be 'hung' onto this arm.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: lats
es: dorsales

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Take hold of a chin up bar with an overhand grip, straight arm and allow the majority of your body weight be 'hung' onto this arm.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Agarra a chin up bar with an agarre prono, recto brazo and permite the majority of tu peso corporal be 'hung' onto this brazo.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Foam Roll Hamstrings
instructions: Take a seat on the floor with a foam roller placed underneath your left hamstring. Have your left leg entended out straight with your right leg bent at a 90 degree angle. Have your hands placed on the floor behind you for support. This will be your starting position.

Lift your hips up and off the floor and put as much pressure down through your left hamstring as you possibly can. Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller to release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: hamstrings
es: isquiosurales

en: Take a seat on the floor with a foam roller placed underneath your left hamstring. Have your left leg entended out straight with your right leg bent at a 90 degree angle. Have your hands placed on the floor behind you for support. This will be your starting position.

Lift your hips up and off the floor and put as much pressure down through your left hamstring as you possibly can. Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller to release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Siéntate on el suelo with a foam roller colocad debajo de tu izquierdo hamstring. Have tu izquierdo pierna entended out recto con tu derecho pierna bent at a 90 degree angle. Have tu manos colocad on el suelo detrás de for support. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Eleva tu caderas up and off el suelo and put as much pressure down through tu izquierdo hamstring as possibly puedas. Roll tu cuerpo espalda and hacia delante on the foam roller to release any tensión may have.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.

name: Groiners
instructions: Adopt the top of a press up position with your hands just wider that shoulder width, your feet together and your body suspended above the floor in a straight line (between your heels and shoulders). This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and jump forward so that your feet land (open toed) next to your hands. Your knees should be wider than your elbows and your pelvis should drop towards the floor once you reach the end of the movement.
Once you have acheived this position, inhale and jump back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: adductors
es: aductores

en: Adopt the top of a press up position with your hands just wider that shoulder width, your feet together and your body suspended above the floor in a straight line (between your heels and shoulders). This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and jump forward so that your feet land (open toed) next to your hands. Your knees should be wider than your elbows and your pelvis should drop towards the floor once you reach the end of the movement.
Once you have acheived this position, inhale and jump back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Adopt the parte superior of a press up posición con tu manos just amplior that anchura de hombros, tu pies together and tu cuerpo suspended por encima de el suelo in a recto line (entre tu talones and hombros). Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and jump hacia delante so that tu pies land (open toed) next to tu manos. tu rodillas should be amplior than tu codos and tu pelvis should drop hacia el suelo once reach the end of the movimiento.
Once have acheived this posición, inhala and jump espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Foam Roll Feet
instructions: Take a seat on a bench/chair and remove your shoes. Place the foam roller underneath the arches in your feet and lean forward so that your weight is putting pressure into the foam roller. This will be your starting position.
Gently roll your feet forward and back so the muscles relieve any tension that they may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: calves
es: gemelos

en: Take a seat on a bench/chair and remove your shoes. Place the foam roller underneath the arches in your feet and lean forward so that your weight is putting pressure into the foam roller. This will be your starting position.
Gently roll your feet forward and back so the muscles relieve any tension that they may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Siéntate on a banco/silla and remove tu shoes. Coloca the foam roller debajo de the arches in tu pies and inclínate hacia delante so that tu peso is putting pressure into the foam roller. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Gently roll tu pies hacia delante and espalda so the muscles retúmbateve any tensión that they may have.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Foam Roll Upper Back
instructions: Take a seat on the floor with a foam roller placed just behind you. Lean backwards onto the foam roller with your upper back the point of contact. Cross your arms in front of your body and roll your shoulders forwards. Keep your knees bent at a 90 degree angle with your feet flat on the floor. This will be your starting position.
Lift your hips off the floor and exert pressure through one side of your back by leaning across. Gently roll the muscles so that you relieve any tensions that you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: middle back

en: traps

name: Foam Roll Quadriceps
instructions: Lay on the floor (face down) with a foam roller underneath your right thigh. Have your left leg bent and out to one side so that your toes are on the floor. This way you can put as much pressure as possible into the right quadricep. Support your upper body by placing your hands on the floor. This will be your starting position.
Lift your hips up and off the floor and put as much pressure down into your thigh as you possibly can. Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller to release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: quadriceps

name: Foam Roll Adductors
instructions: Lay on the floor (face down) with a foam roller underneath your inner right thigh. Have both your legs straight but with a slight bent. Support your upper body by placing your left forearm on the floor and lift your right shoulder by leaning onto your right hand. This will be your starting position.
Lift your hips up and off the floor and put as much pressure down into your inner thigh as you possibly can. Roll your body back and forward on the foam roller to release any tension you may have.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

name: Dynamic hamstring stretch
instructions: Lay down, face up on a mat with your arms by your sides and legs flat on the floor.

Lift your left leg up so that your hip is at a 90 degree angle. Link your fingers together around the back of your upper left leg (just below your knee). Keep your torso in contact with the floor. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and extend your left heel directly up towards the ceiling until your leg is as straight as possible.
Inhale and return your lower leg back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: hamstrings
es: isquiosurales

en: calves
es: gemelos

Eleva tu izquierdo pierna up so that tu cadera is at a 90 degree angle. Link tu dedos together around la espalda of tu upper izquierdo pierna (just below tu rodilla). Mantén tu torso in contact with el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

name: Dynamic Chest Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your arms at full extension directly out in front of you. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms parallel with the floor, open them up so that they are now extended out to your sides. Tip: to emphasise this stretch, try to get the back of your hands together behind your body.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

es: pecho

name: Dynamic Back Stretch
instructions: Your starting position will be a standing shoulder width stance.
Keeping your arms straight, exhale and swing them up above your head so that they are vertical from the floor.
Once you have acheived full range of motion about your shoulder joints, inhale and return your arms back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: Foam Roll Calves
instructions: Take a seat on the floor with your legs out straight, your calves on top of a foam roller. You can either cross your legs over or have one foot planted on the floor to exert extra force into the calf being rolled. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, place your hands on the floor by the side of your hips and lift your pelvis off the floor. Put as much pressure down through your calves as possible and roll from the very top of the muscle down towards the ankle (make each rolling motion as large as possible to engage as many muscle fibres as possible). Once you reach the bottom of your calf, roll back upwards.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: calves

name: broomstick stretch
instructions: Adopt a shoulder width, standing stance. Grab hold of a broomstick with both hands, with a wide overhand grip.
Exhale as you bring the broomstick out, up and over your head. Keep your arms extended for as long as you can until your elbows start to bend as you bring the broomstick over your head.
Inhale and return the broomstick back along the same arcing path towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Remain aware of your posture and your core.

name: Arm Circles
instructions: Adopt a shoulder width standing stance. Elevate your out stretched arms to shoulder height so that they are parallel with the floor. This will be your starting position.
Imagine you are drawing circles with your hands but the movement comes from your shoulders.
The bigger the circle the more rotation your will get from your shoulder joint.
Complete the recommended amount of reptetitions or time set.

name: Foam Roll Tibialis Anterior
instructions: Begin seated on the ground with your legs bent and your feet on the floor.

Using a Muscle Roller or a rolling pin, apply pressure to the muscles on the outside of your shins. Work from just below the knee to above the ankle, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds. Repeat on the other leg.

name: Kettlebell Bent Over Rows
instructions: Place two kettlebells in front of your feet. Bend your knees slightly and then push your butt out as much as possible as you bend over to get in the starting position.
Grab both kettlebells and pull them to your stomach, retracting your shoulder blades and flexing the elbows.  Keep your back straight. Lower and repeat.

Coge both kettlebells and tira them to tu stomach, retracting tu hombro blades and flexing the codos. Mantén tu espalda recto. Baja and repeat.

name: Kettlebell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebells up so that your hands are beside your ears, elbows are flared out wide and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and press the kettlebells above your head until your arms are nearly locked out.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebells back along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name: Double Kettlebell Cleans
instructions: Place two kettlebells between your feet. To get in the starting position, push your butt back and look straight ahead.
Clean the kettlebells to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebells towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrists as you do so.
Lower the kettlebells back to the starting position and repeat.

name: Kettlebell Turkish Get Up
instructions: Grab a mat and a kettlebell in your right hand (with an overhand grip) and lay down on your back. Press your right arm towards the ceiling so that it is vertical from the floor with the kettlebell resting on the back of your forearm. Your left knee should be bent to a 90 degree angle with your foot planted on the floor, your right leg should be extended, flat on the floor. Keep your sight focused on the bottom of the kettlebell. This is your starting position.
To initiate this movement, exhale and bring your torso up and off the floor until you are sitting upright. Tip: Keep your arm pressed towards the ceiling throughout.

Next, inhale and place your left arm out wide on the floor and bring your bodyweight across onto it. As you do so, bring your right leg around and under your body so that you are now at the bottom of a lunge.
Exhale and elevate your body into a standing position. Remember to keep the kettlebell pressed towards the ceiling and maintain good posture throughout.
After a brief pause, return your body back to its starting position along the same path.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: shoulders
es: hombros

quadriceps
triceps

es: Coge a colchoneta and a kettlebell in tu derecho mano (with an agarre prono) and lay down on tu espalda. Press tu derecho brazo hacia el techo so that it is vertical from el suelo with the kettlebell resting on la espalda of tu antebrazo. tu izquierdo rodilla should be bent to a 90 degree angle con tu pie planted on el suelo, tu derecho pierna should be extiendeed, flat on el suelo. Mantén tu sight focused on the parte baja of the kettlebell. Esta es tu posición inicial.
To initiate this movimiento, exhala and lleva tu torso up and off el suelo hasta que are siéntateting erguido. Consejo: Mantén tu brazo pressed hacia el techo durante todo.

A continuación, inhala and coloca tu izquierdo brazo out amplio on el suelo and lleva tu peso corporal across onto it. As do so, lleva tu derecho pierna around and under tu cuerpo so that are now at the parte baja of a zancada.
Exhala and eleva tu cuerpo into a colócate de pieing posición. Remember to mantén the kettlebell pressed hacia el techo and maintain good posture durante todo.
Después de una breve pausa, vuelve tu cuerpo espalda to its posición inicial along the same path.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.

name: Push Press
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebells up so that your hands are beside your ears, elbows are flared out wide and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and gently bend at your knees and hips so that you create a small squat. Immediately after doing this, exhale and use this power to drive through your heels and thighs to press the kettlebells above your head until your arms are nearly locked out.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebells back along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name: Plyo Kettlebell Press Ups
instructions: Grab a kettlebell and place it on the floor in front of you. Next, kneel down and lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms (one of which is holding onto the kettlebell handle). Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be one of your hands, the kettlebell and your feet. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whist flaring your elbows out wide. Continue until your elbows are at a 90 degree angle.

Pause for a brief movement, exhale and press through your palms as hard as you can to generate enough force so that you 'jump' your torso across to the opposite side of the kettlebell whilst exchanging the hand that holds the handle.

Land straight into your next repetition so bend at your elbows and inhale on your descent until your elbows are at 90 degrees, then power up as hard as you can whilst exhaling and 'jump' your torso across to the opposite side of the kettlebell and exchange your grip once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Press Ups or Dumbbell Bench Press.

Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Press Ups or Dumbbell Bench Press.
es: Coge a kettlebell and coloca it on el suelo delante de . A continuación, rodillal down and inclínate hacia delante so that are now peso baring on tu brazos (one of which is holding onto the kettlebell manole). Have tu manos colocad just outlado of where tu pecho would be. Now should come up onto tu pies so that tu cuerpo is suspended por encima de el suelo, the only points of contact (with el suelo) should be one of tu manos, the kettlebell and tu pies. tu cuerpo should be in one recto line from cabeza to toe and tu brazos perpendicular to el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
mientras inhaling, lentamente baja tu pecho hacia the ground whist flaring tu codos out amplio. Continúa hasta que tu codos are at a 90 degree angle.

Haz una pausa for a brief movimiento, exhala and press through tu palmas as hard as can to generate enough fuerza so that 'jump' tu torso across to the contrario lado of the kettlebell mientras exchanging the mano that holds the manole.

Land recto into tu next repetition so flexiona at tu codos and inhala on tu descent hasta que tu codos are at 90 degrees, then power up as hard as can mientras exhaling and 'jump' tu torso across to the contrario lado of the kettlebell and exchange tu grip once more.
Repite the movimiento durante el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press Ups or Dumbbell Bench Press.

name: Single Arm Overhead Kettlebell Squats
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your right hand and extend it above your head vertically from the floor with an overhand grip so the kettlebell is resting on the back of your forearm. Adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance with your left arm behind your back. This will be your starting position. Tip: Your arm will remain vertical from the floor throughout!
To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips to descend your pelvis either in line or just past your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout and maintain good posture.
Once you get to the bottom of the movement, exhale and press through your heels to extend your hip and knee joints, elevating your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Overhead Squats.

es: Coge a kettlebell in tu derecho mano and extiende it por encima de tu cabeza vertically from el suelo with an agarre prono so the kettlebell is resting on la espalda of tu antebrazo. Adopta una slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura con tu izquierdo brazo detrás de tu espalda. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: tu brazo will remain vertical from el suelo durante todo!

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas to desciende tu pelvis either in line or just past tu rodillas. Consejo: Mantén a recto espalda durante todo and maintain good posture.
Once get to the parte baja of the movimiento, exhala and press through tu talones to extiende tu cadera and rodilla joints, elevating tu torso espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.
Variaciones: Dumbbell Squats or Overcabeza Squats.

name: One-Arm Kettlebell Split Snatch
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your right hand with a neutral grip (palm facing your thigh) and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor beside your torso. This will be your starting position.

To Initiate the movement, inhale and gently squat by bending at your knees and hips. As you do so bring the kettlebell between your legs and push it towards the floor. Once you are half way down into a squatting position, pull the kettlebell up and towards the ceiling until your arm is vertical from the floor and the kettlebell is resting on the back of your forearm. Simultaneously exhale and immediately press through your thighs and extend your hips forward so much so that you jump off the floor slightly. This will allow you to split your stance and descend into a lunge position (90 degrees at both knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell down towards your shoulder before returning it into its starting position as you ascend your body into your original standing position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Double Kettlebell Jerk or Kettlebell Snatch.

es: Coge a kettlebell in tu derecho mano with a agarre neutro (palma facing tu thigh) and adopt a slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura. Allow tu brazos to hang perpendicular to el suelo belado tu torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

To Initiate the movimiento, inhala and suavemente squat by flexionaing at tu rodillas and caderas. As do so lleva the kettlebell entre tu piernas and empuja it hacia el suelo. Once are half way down into a squatting posición, tira the kettlebell up and hacia el techo hasta que tu brazo is vertical from el suelo and the kettlebell is resting on la espalda of tu antebrazo. Simultaneously exhala and immediately press through tu thighs and extiende tu caderas hacia delante so much so that jump off el suelo slightly. This will permite to separar tu postura and desciende into a zancada posición (90 degrees at both rodillas).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebell down hacia tu hombro before vuelveing it into its posición inicial as ascend tu cuerpo into tu original colócate de pieing posición.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.
Variaciones: Double Kettlebell Jerk or Kettlebell Snatch.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Split Jerk
instructions: Grab a kettlebell and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebell up to your shoulder and allow it to rest against the back of your forearm. At this point, your elbow should be bent to 90 degrees and flared out wide. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.

Your first movement is to descend into a squatting motion by bending at your knees and hips. Once you get half way down, drive upward through your heels and quads in order to start elevating your torso and kettlebell, exhale as you do so.

Generate enough force so that you jump off the floor and land in a split stance to continue descending into a lunge. Simultaneously, press the kettlebell above your head until your elbow is locked out. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout.
Return your body to a standing position with your arm and kettlebell extended towards the ceiling. After a brief pause, return the kettlebell back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Clean and Jerk or Kettlebell Jerk.

es: Coge a kettlebell and adopt a slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura. Bring the kettlebell up to tu hombro and permite it to rest contra la espalda of tu antebrazo. At this point, tu codo should be bent to 90 degrees and flared out amplio. tu pecho, hombros and cabeza should be facing hacia delante. Esta será tu posición inicial.

tu first movimiento is to desciende into a squatting motion by flexionaing at tu rodillas and caderas. Once get half way down, drive arriba through tu talones and cuádriceps in order to start elevating tu torso and kettlebell, exhala as do so.

Generate enough fuerza so that jump off el suelo and land in a separar postura to continue desciendeing into a zancada. Simultaneously, press the kettlebell por encima de tu cabeza hasta que tu codo is locked out. Consejo: Mantén a recto espalda durante todo.
Vuelve tu cuerpo to a colócate de pieing posición con tu brazo and kettlebell extiendeed hacia el techo. Después de una breve pausa, vuelve the kettlebell espalda to its posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap brazos.
Variaciones: Cinclínate and Jerk or Kettlebell Jerk.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Rows
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your left hand with a neutral grip (palm facing towards the right). Place this kettlebell just inside of your right foot whilst taking a big step backwards with your left foot. Bend your right knee and support your bodyweight on your thigh through your right forearm. Your back should be straight and your left arm should be hanging perpendicular to the floor as the kettlebell is now directly under your chest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your left elbow up towards the ceiling whilst brushing your torso with it as you go. Continue to pull the kettlebell upward until the muscles in your back are as tight as they can be. Tip: Your arms should remain as passive as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Low Cable Row or Single Arm Row.

es: Coge a kettlebell in tu izquierdo mano with a agarre neutro (palma facing hacia the derecho). Coloca this kettlebell just inlado of tu derecho pie mientras taking a big step hacia atráss con tu izquierdo pie. Flexiona tu derecho rodilla and support tu peso corporal on tu thigh through tu derecho antebrazo. tu espalda should be recto and tu izquierdo brazo should be hanging perpendicular to el suelo as the kettlebell is now directamente under tu pecho. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and tira tu izquierdo codo up hacia el techo mientras brushing tu torso with it durante el movimiento. Continúa to tira the kettlebell arriba hasta que the muscles in tu espalda are as tight as they can be. Consejo: tu brazos should remain as passive lo máximo posible durante todo.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebell espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite the movimiento durante el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.
Variaciones: Low Cable Row or Single Arm Row.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Push Press
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your right hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebell up so that your hand is beside your ear, elbow should be flared out wide and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure your palm is facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and gently bend at your knees and hips so that you create a small squat. Immediately after doing this, exhale and use this power to drive through your heels and thighs to press the kettlebell above your head until your arm is nearly locked out (slight bend at the elbow).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Double Kettlebell Push Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Shoulder Press
instructions: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces inward. This will be your starting position.
Look at the kettlebell and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Lower the kettlebell back to your shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract your lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.

Look at the kettlebell and press it up and out hasta que it is locked out overcabeza.
Baja the kettlebell espalda to tu hombro under control and repeat. Make sure to contract tu lat, butt, and stomach fuerzacompletamente for added stability and strength.

name: One-Arm Kettlebell Floor Press
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your left hand with an overhand grip (palm facing away from you) and lay on your back. Have your arm bent at a 90 degree angle with your elbow flared out wide (the kettlebell should be resting on the back of your forearm at this point). Finally have your knees bent to create a 90 degree angle whilst keeping your feet on the floor. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing the kettlebell towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the kettlebell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternating Kettlebell Floor Press or Chest Press.

Have tu brazo bent at a 90 degree angle con tu codo flared out amplio (the kettlebell should be resting on la espalda of tu antebrazo at this point). Finally have tu rodillas bent to create a 90 degree angle mientras manténing tu pies on el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Initiate the movimiento by exhaling and pressing the kettlebell hacia el techo hasta que tu codo joint is nearly at full extensión.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and lentamente vuelve the kettlebell along the same path, espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Alternating Kettlebell Floor Press or Chest Press.

name: Kettlebell Lunge Pass Through
instructions: To begin this movement, stand with a kettlebell in your left hand (neutral grip), arms by your sides with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, inhale and stride forward with your right foot, descend your left knee until it nearly touches the floor creating a 90 degree angle at both knee joints. At this point your right knee should stay over the top of your right foot, with your torso upright. As you drop your bodyweight down into this position you are going to pass the kettlebell through the gap created underneath your right thigh and hand it over to your right hand.
After a brief pause, exhale and push through the heel of your front foot to bring your torso back along the same path into the starting position again.
Repeat the movement with the opposite leg and repeat until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.

At this point tu derecho rodilla should stay over the parte superior of tu derecho pie, con tu torso erguido. As drop tu peso corporal down into this posición are going to pass the kettlebell through the gap created debajo de tu derecho thigh and mano it over to tu derecho mano.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala and empuja through the talón of tu delantero pie to lleva tu torso espalda along the same path into la posición inicial again.
Repite the movimiento with the contrario pierna and repeat hasta que have completed the número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Barbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.

name: Leg-Over Floor Press
instructions: Lie on the floor with a kettlebell in your left hand. Bend your left leg to a 90-degree angle and bring this over your body so your knee is close to the floor.
Whilst in this position, exhale and extend your left-hand (and kettlebell) towards the ceiling. Continue with this movement until your elbow is nearly at full extension.
Once at the top of the movement, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning the kettlebell along the same path, back to it's starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Windmill
instructions: Place a kettlebell in front of your lead foot and clean and press it overhead with your opposite arm. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Press it overhead by extending the elbow.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn your feet out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm with the locked out kettlebell. Bending at the hip to one side, sticking your butt out, slowly lean until you can touch the floor with your free hand. Keep your eyes on the kettlebell that you hold over your head at all times.
Pause for a second after reaching the ground and reverse the motion back to the starting position.

Cinclínate the kettlebell to tu hombro by extiendeing through the piernas and caderas as tira the kettlebell hacia tu hombros. Rota tu wrist as do so, so that the palma faces hacia delante. Press it overcabeza by extiendeing the codo.

Manténing the kettlebell locked out at all times, empuja tu butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn tu pies out at a forty-five degree angle from the brazo with the locked out kettlebell. Flexionaing at the cadera to one lado, sticking tu butt out, lentamente inclínate hasta que can touch el suelo con tu free mano. Mantén tu eyes on the kettlebell that hold over tu cabeza at all times.
Haz una pausa for a second after reaching the ground and reverse the motion espalda to la posición inicial.

name: Kettlebell Thruster
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebells up so that your hands are beside your ears, elbows are flared out wide and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement to minimise the risk of an injury. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips so that you descend into a squat. Once your thighs are either parallel to the floor, or just past, immediately exhale and use the power you have generated in your legs to drive through your heels and thighs to press the kettlebells above your head until your arms are nearly locked out.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebells back along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Single Arm Kettlebell Push Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

Variations: Single Arm Kettlebell Push Press or Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Coge a kettlebell in each mano and adopt a anchura de hombros postura. Bring the kettlebells up so that tu manos are belado tu ears, codos are flared out amplio and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure tu palmas are facing hacia delante at this point. Consejo: Mantén a recto espalda durante todo this movimiento to minimise the risk of an injury. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas so that desciende into a squat. Once tu thighs are either parallel to el suelo, or just past, immediately exhala and use the power have generated in tu piernas to drive through tu talones and thighs to press the kettlebells por encima de tu cabeza hasta que tu brazos are nearly locked out.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebells espalda along the same path espalda to their posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Single Arm Kettlebell Empuja Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Swings
instructions: Grab a kettlebell with your right hand and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Take hold of the kettlebell with an overhand grip (palm facing behind you) and stand upright with the weight in front of you. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips so that your thighs are parallel to the floor. At the same time bring the kettlebell between your legs and push your hand towards the floor to emphasise the power generated in your legs.
Immediately after doing this, exhale and use this power to drive through your heels, thighs and hips to pull the kettlebell to head height with your arm full extended as you go.
Inhale and return the kettlebell along the same path back between your legs as you squat into the next repetition.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Squat Jumps or TRX Squat Jumps.

name: Kettlebell Sumo High Pulls
instructions: Take hold of a kettlebell by its handle in both hands (overhand grip) and stand up straight. Maintain this straight posture throughout the movement and allow your arms to hang straight towards the floor in front of your torso. Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly facing outwards, this will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend by bending at your knees and hips. Remember to keep your knees behind your toes and put most of your weight through your heels. Continue in this descent until your thighs are either parallel to the floor or just past.

After a brief pause, exhale and simultaneously push through your heels, thighs and hips to drive your torso back along the same path into the starting position whilst pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin. Keep your elbows higher than the kettlebell at all times and keep it close to your body.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path in to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Make sure to maintain posture as failure to do so could result in injury.
Variations: Barbell Sumo Squats or Dumbbell Sumo Squats.
