en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells both up and outward whilst rotating your palms to face the ceiling.
Continue on an upward motion until your biceps are optimally contracted.
After this, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Concentration Curls or Concentration Curls.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros con los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo, a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y doble las mancuernas hacia arriba y hacia afuera mientras gira las palmas de las manos hacia el techo.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que sus bíceps estén óptimamente contraídos.
Después de esto, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curls de concentración de pie o Curls de concentración.

name: Standing Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Grab a dumbbell with both hands and adopt a standing shoulder width stance. Create a diamond shape with your hands by connecting your thumbs to each other and your index fingers to one another. The handle of the dumbbell should sit in the diamond shaped gap that you have made. Once you have done this, allow one end of the dumbbell to slide down down that you now have your palms in contact with the rubber/metal end. Press the dumbbell directly above your head with your palms angled towards to the ceiling. This is your starting position. Tip: Your elbows should remain as close together as possible throughout the movement.

To initiate the movement, inhale and control the descent of the dumbbell down behind your head. Bend at your elbows to allow this movement to take place yet keep them as close together as possible. Continue descending until your elbows are at 90 degrees or you can feel a stretch in your triceps.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position by contracting your triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: EZ Bar Skullcrushers or Dumbbell Kickbacks.

name.es: Extensión de tríceps con mancuerna sobre la cabeza de pie

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: Grab a dumbbell with both hands and adopt a standing shoulder width stance. Create a diamond shape with your hands by connecting your thumbs to each other and your index fingers to one another. The handle of the dumbbell should sit in the diamond shaped gap that you have made. Once you have done this, allow one end of the dumbbell to slide down down that you now have your palms in contact with the rubber/metal end. Press the dumbbell directly above your head with your palms angled towards to the ceiling. This is your starting position. Tip: Your elbows should remain as close together as possible throughout the movement.

To initiate the movement, inhale and control the descent of the dumbbell down behind your head. Bend at your elbows to allow this movement to take place yet keep them as close together as possible. Continue descending until your elbows are at 90 degrees or you can feel a stretch in your triceps.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position by contracting your triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: EZ Bar Skullcrushers or Dumbbell Kickbacks.
es: Agarra una mancuerna con ambas manos y adopte una postura de pie a la altura de los hombros. Crea una forma de diamante con tus manos conectando tus pulgares entre sí y tus dedos índices entre sí. El mango de la mancuerna debe quedar en el espacio en forma de diamante que has hecho. Una vez que haya hecho esto, permita que un extremo de la mancuerna se deslice hacia abajo hasta que ahora tenga las palmas de las manos en contacto con el extremo de goma/metal. Empuja la mancuerna directamente sobre su cabeza con las palmas de las manos hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial. Consejo: tus codos deben permanecer lo más juntos posible durante todo el movimiento.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y controla el descenso de la mancuerna detrás de tu cabeza. Doble los codos para permitir que se realice este movimiento, pero manténgalos lo más juntos posible. Continúa descendiendo hasta que sus codos estén a 90 grados o pueda sentir un estiramiento en sus tríceps.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino a su posición inicial contrayendo los tríceps.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: barra EZ Skullcrushers o Dumbbell Kickbacks.

name: Standing Dumbbell Straight-Arm Front Delt Raise Above Head
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in both hands with a standing shoulder width stance. Adopt an overhand grip and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor in front of your body. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull (in a semi-circular motion) the back of one of your hand up towards the ceiling. Keep your arm at full reach (elbow slightly bent) as you go and continue until your arm is vertical from the floor and pointing towards the ceiling. Tip: Your palm should now be facing forwards.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position.
Alternate as you go and complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternating Front Raise or Front Raise And Pullover.

name.en: Standing Dumbbell Straight-Arm Front Delt Raise Above Head

en: Grab a dumbbell in both hands with a standing shoulder width stance. Adopt an overhand grip and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor in front of your body. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull (in a semi-circular motion) the back of one of your hand up towards the ceiling. Keep your arm at full reach (elbow slightly bent) as you go and continue until your arm is vertical from the floor and pointing towards the ceiling. Tip: Your palm should now be facing forwards.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position.
Alternate as you go and complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternating Front Raise or Front Raise And Pullover.
es: Agarra una mancuerna con ambas manos con una postura de pie a la altura de los hombros. Adopte un agarre prono y permita que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo frente a tu cuerpo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y tire (con un movimiento semicircular) del dorso de una mano hacia el techo. Mantén el brazo extendido (el codo ligeramente doblado) durante el movimiento y continúe hasta que el brazo esté vertical desde el suelo y apuntando hacia el techo. Consejo: Tu palma ahora debería estar mirando hacia adelante.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Alterne durante el movimiento y complete la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: elevación frontal alternada o elevación frontal y pullover.

aliases: Standing Dumbbell Straight-Arm Front Delt Raise Above Head

name: Standing Dumbbell Reverse Curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) in a standing position, with your arms at full length, hanging perpendicular to the floor in front of your body. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Inhale as you lower the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position.
Continue for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Reverse Plate Curls or Reverse Cable Curls.

name.es: Curl inverso con mancuernas de pie

en: biceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) in a standing position, with your arms at full length, hanging perpendicular to the floor in front of your body. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Inhale as you lower the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position.
Continue for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Reverse Plate Curls or Reverse Cable Curls.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano con un agarre prono (con las palmas hacia los muslos) en posición de pie, con los brazos extendidos y colgando perpendiculares al suelo frente a tu cuerpo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Mantén la contracción por un segundo mientras aprietas el bíceps. Consejo: Sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.
Inhale mientras baja las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Continúa con la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl con placa invertida o Curl con cable inverso.

name: Dumbbell Calf Raises
instructions: Grab two dumbbells with a neutral grip and stand with a shoulder width stance. Make sure you are standing upright with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang beside you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and raise your heels as high as possible by pushing off of the balls of your feet, flexing your calves throughout the contraction. Your knees should remain extended. Hold the contracted position for a second before you start to go back down.
Inhale and return slowly to the starting position as you lower your heels towards the floor.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Calf Raises or Smith Machine Calf Raises.

en: calves
es: gemelos

en: Grab two dumbbells with a neutral grip and stand with a shoulder width stance. Make sure you are standing upright with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang beside you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and raise your heels as high as possible by pushing off of the balls of your feet, flexing your calves throughout the contraction. Your knees should remain extended. Hold the contracted position for a second before you start to go back down.
Inhale and return slowly to the starting position as you lower your heels towards the floor.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Calf Raises or Smith Machine Calf Raises.
es: Agarra dos mancuernas con un agarre neutral y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Asegúrate de estar de pie con una ligera flexión de rodillas y codos. Deja que tus brazos cuelguen a tu lado, perpendiculares al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Exhale y levante los talones lo más alto posible empujando las puntas de los pies, flexionando los gemelos durante la contracción. Tus rodillas deben permanecer extendidas. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo antes de comenzar a bajar.
Inhala y regresa lentamente a la posición inicial mientras bajas los talones hacia el suelo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Elevaciones de gemelos sentado o Elevaciones de gemelos con máquina Smith.

name: Bent Over Dumbbell Spider Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in the arm that you wish to work upon. Lean forward from your waist (whilst maintaining a straight back) and let your arm hang perpendicular to the floor. Bend at your knees and adopt a neutral grip (palm facing in). This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by flexing your bicep. Continue to flex until you cannot contract the bicep anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and bring the dumbbell back down along the same path until you reach the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Standing One-Arm Cable curl.

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: forearms
es: antebrazos

en: Grab a dumbbell in the arm that you wish to work upon. Lean forward from your waist (whilst maintaining a straight back) and let your arm hang perpendicular to the floor. Bend at your knees and adopt a neutral grip (palm facing in). This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by flexing your bicep. Continue to flex until you cannot contract the bicep anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and bring the dumbbell back down along the same path until you reach the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Standing One-Arm Cable curl.
es: Coge una mancuerna en el brazo que deseas trabajar. Inclínese hacia adelante desde la cintura (mientras mantiene la espalda recta) y deje que el brazo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo. Doble las rodillas y adopte un agarre neutral (con la palma hacia adentro). Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhala, mantenga la parte superior del brazo inmóvil y doble la mancuerna hacia el hombro flexionando el bíceps. Continúa flexionando hasta que ya no pueda contraer el bíceps.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y baja la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta llegar a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Curl con cable con un solo brazo de pie.

name: Bent Over Single Arm Tricep Kickbacks
instructions: With a dumbbell in one hand and the palm facing your torso, bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor.  Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper arm should be close to the torso and parallel to the floor while the forearm is pointing towards the floor as the hand holds the weight. Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearm and the upper arm.  This is your starting position.

Keeping the upper arms stationary, use the triceps to lift the weights as you exhale until the forearms are parallel to the floor and the whole arm is extended.  Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

name.en: Bent Over Single Arm Tricep Kickbacks
name.es: Patada de tríceps a un brazo inclinado

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: With a dumbbell in one hand and the palm facing your torso, bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward, by bending at the waist, while keeping the back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor.  Make sure that you keep the head up.

The upper arm should be close to the torso and parallel to the floor while the forearm is pointing towards the floor as the hand holds the weight. Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between the forearm and the upper arm.  This is your starting position.

Keeping the upper arms stationary, use the triceps to lift the weights as you exhale until the forearms are parallel to the floor and the whole arm is extended.  Like many other arm exercises, only the forearm moves.
After a second contraction at the top, slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
es: Con una mancuerna en una mano y la palma hacia el torso, flexiona ligeramente las rodillas y lleva el torso hacia adelante, flexionando la cintura, manteniendo la espalda recta hasta que quede casi paralela al suelo.  Asegúrate de mantener la cabeza erguida.

La parte superior del brazo debe estar cerca del torso y paralela al suelo mientras que el antebrazo apunta hacia el suelo mientras la mano sostiene el peso. Consejo: debe haber un ángulo de 90 grados entre el antebrazo y la parte superior del brazo.  Esta es tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles, use los tríceps para levantar las pesas mientras exhala hasta que los antebrazos queden paralelos al suelo y todo el brazo esté extendido.  Como muchos otros ejercicios para brazos, sólo se mueve el antebrazo.
Después de una segunda contracción en la parte superior, baje lentamente la mancuerna hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Cambia de brazo y repite el ejercicio.

aliases: Standing Bent-Over One-Arm Dumbbell Triceps Extension
Bent Over Single Arm Tricep Kickbacks

name: Standing Alternate Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance (standing). Bring the dumbbells up to the side of your shoulders so your elbows are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle, your palms should be facing forward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press one of the dumbbells towards the ceiling until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight). Keep your other arm stationary in the starting position.
After a brief pause, return the dumbbell back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the opposite side and alternate between arms.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Press or Alternating Cable Shoulder Press.

es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros (de pie). Lleve las mancuernas a los lados de los hombros de modo que los codos queden abiertos y en un ángulo de 90 grados, con las palmas hacia adelante. Mantén la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhala, presione una de las mancuernas hacia el techo hasta que el codo esté completamente extendido (recto). Mantén el otro brazo inmóvil en la posición inicial.
Después de una breve pausa, regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repite para el lado opuesto y alterne entre brazos.
Completa la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Arnold Press o Press de hombros con cable alterno.

name: Dumbbell Bulgarian Split Squats
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and position yourself so that one foot is flat on the floor and the other is behind you, at knee height supported by a bench (an exaggerated step's distance away). Keep your arms by your side at full extension throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.

From here, start to descend by bending at your knees (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front knee. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front knee does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movement, before exhaling and driving up through your front heel and thigh, until you return to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Barbell Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.

Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movement, before exhaling and driving up through your front heel and thigh, until you return to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Barbell Split Squats or TRX Split Squats.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y colóquese de modo que un pie quede apoyado en el suelo y el otro detrás de ti, a la altura de las rodillas apoyado en un banco (a una distancia de un paso exagerado). Mantén los brazos a los lados en extensión completa durante todo el movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Desde aquí, comience a descender doblando las rodillas (manteniendo una buena postura) hasta crear un ángulo de 90 grados en la rodilla delantera. A medida que desciendes, debes inhalar y asegurarte de que la rodilla delantera no se extienda más allá de los dedos de los pies.
Haz una pausa por un breve momento en la parte inferior del movimiento, antes de exhalar y subir por el talón y el muslo delanteros, hasta regresar a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: sentadillas divididas con barra o sentadillas divididas TRX.

name: Spell Caster
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Adopt an over hand grip (palms facing your body) and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor in front of you. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and press the dumbbells downward, towards your right knee, rotating your torso and gently bending at your knees and hips to accommodate this movement.

Next, exhale and pull the dumbbells (through your core) upon a diagonal rotating path towards the top left hand corner of your reach. Tip: Keep your arms straight throughout the movement (with a slight bend at your elbows).

After you have reached the top left corner of your reach, inhale and control the descent of the Dumbbells towards your left knee. Again, your core should be rotated and you should bend at your knees and hips to accommodate this movement.
Once you reach the side of your knee, exhale and pull the dumbbells (through your core) upon a diagonal rotating path towards the top right hand corner of your reach.

After you have reached the top right corner of your reach, inhale and control the descent of the Dumbbells towards your right knee, ready for your second repetition. The movement should draw an imaginary 'X' in front of your body.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Plate Side Bends or Oblique Crunches.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Adopt an over hand grip (palms facing your body) and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor in front of you. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and press the dumbbells downward, towards your right knee, rotating your torso and gently bending at your knees and hips to accommodate this movement.

Next, exhale and pull the dumbbells (through your core) upon a diagonal rotating path towards the top left hand corner of your reach. Tip: Keep your arms straight throughout the movement (with a slight bend at your elbows).

After you have reached the top left corner of your reach, inhale and control the descent of the Dumbbells towards your left knee. Again, your core should be rotated and you should bend at your knees and hips to accommodate this movement.
Once you reach the side of your knee, exhale and pull the dumbbells (through your core) upon a diagonal rotating path towards the top right hand corner of your reach.

After you have reached the top right corner of your reach, inhale and control the descent of the Dumbbells towards your right knee, ready for your second repetition. The movement should draw an imaginary 'X' in front of your body.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Plate Side Bends or Oblique Crunches.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Adopte un agarre prono (con las palmas hacia el cuerpo) y permita que los brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo frente a ti. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y presione las mancuernas hacia abajo, hacia la rodilla derecha, rotando el torso y doblando suavemente las rodillas y las caderas para adaptarse a este movimiento.

Luego, exhala y tira de las mancuernas (a través de tu core) en una trayectoria giratoria diagonal hacia la esquina superior izquierda de tu alcance. Consejo: Mantén los brazos rectos durante todo el movimiento (con una ligera flexión de los codos).

Una vez que hayas llegado a la esquina superior izquierda de tu alcance, inhala y controla el descenso de las mancuernas hacia tu rodilla izquierda. Nuevamente, tu core debe rotarse y debes doblar las rodillas y las caderas para adaptarse a este movimiento.
Una vez que llegue al costado de su rodilla, exhale y tire de las mancuernas (a través de tu core) en una trayectoria giratoria diagonal hacia la esquina superior derecha de su alcance.

Una vez que hayas llegado a la esquina superior derecha de tu alcance, inhala y controla el descenso de las mancuernas hacia tu rodilla derecha, lista para tu segunda repetición. El movimiento debe dibujar una 'X' imaginaria delante de tu cuerpo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: flexiones laterales con placa o abdominales oblicuos.

name: Standing Single Arm Neutral Grip Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the dumbbell up to your shoulder with a neutral grip (palm facing inward so your thumb is near your chin). Place your left arm across your torso to help stabilise the movement. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the dumbbell upward, towards the ceiling. Continue to press the dumbbell upward until your shoulder muscles are at optimal contraction or your arm is at full reach (elbow slightly bent).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell back along this path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Kettlebell Arnold Press or Alternating Cable Shoulder Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the dumbbell up to your shoulder with a neutral grip (palm facing inward so your thumb is near your chin). Place your left arm across your torso to help stabilise the movement. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the dumbbell upward, towards the ceiling. Continue to press the dumbbell upward until your shoulder muscles are at optimal contraction or your arm is at full reach (elbow slightly bent).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell back along this path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Kettlebell Arnold Press or Alternating Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Lleve la mancuerna hasta el hombro con un agarre neutral (con la palma hacia adentro de modo que el pulgar quede cerca de la barbilla). Coloca tu brazo izquierdo sobre su torso para ayudar a estabilizar el movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y presiona la mancuerna hacia arriba, hacia el techo. Continúa presionando la mancuerna hacia arriba hasta que los músculos de su hombro tengan una contracción óptima o tu brazo esté completamente extendido (el codo ligeramente doblado).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por este camino a su posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Press Arnold con pesas rusas o Press de hombros con cable alterno.

aliases: Standing Single Arm Neutral Grip Dumbbell Shoulder Press

name: Standing Single Arm Dumbbell Front Raises
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and adopt a standing shoulder width stance. Adopt an overhand grip and allow your arm to hang perpendicular to the floor in front of your body. This is your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the back of your hand up towards the ceiling. Keep you arm at full reach (elbow slightly bent) as you go and continue until you get to shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Front Cable Raise or Kettlebell Arnold Press.

es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y adopta una postura de pie a la altura de los hombros. Adopte un agarre prono y permita que tu brazo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo frente a tu cuerpo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y levante el dorso de la mano hacia el techo. Mantén el brazo extendido (el codo ligeramente doblado) durante el movimiento y continúe hasta llegar a la altura de los hombros.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Elevación frontal con cable o Press Arnold con pesa rusa.

aliases: Standing Single Arm Dumbbell Front Raises

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Floor Press
instructions: Lie down on a flat surface with your back pressing against the floor or an exercise mat.  Make sure your knees are bent.

Have a partner hand you the bar on one hand.  When starting, your arm should be just about fully extended, similar to the starting position of a barbell bench press.  However, this time your grip will be neutral (palms facing your torso).
Make sure the hand you are not using to lift the weight is placed by your side.
Begin the exercise by lowering the barbell until your elbow touches the ground.  Make sure to breathe in as this is the eccentric (lowering part of the exercise).
Then start lifting the barbell back up to the original starting position.  Remember to breathe out during the concentric (lifting part of the exercise).
Repeat until you have performed your recommended repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.
Variations: You can also perform this exercise using dumbbells.  By using dumbbells you will be able to isolate your chest and add some variety to your workouts.

Caution: When you are done, do not drop the barbell or dumbbell next to you as this is dangerous to your rotator cuff in your shoulders and others working out around you.  A better way to do this is to use both of your hands to grab the barbell or dumbbell and place it to your side.  Simply move the barbell or dumbbell away from the arm you are exercising before dropping the weights.  This will ensure optimal safety and prevent any injuries.

es: Acuéstese sobre una superficie plana con la espalda apoyada contra el suelo o una colchoneta de ejercicios.  Asegúrate de que tus rodillas estén dobladas.

Pídele a un compañero que te entregue la barra con una mano.  Al comenzar, tu brazo debe estar casi completamente extendido, similar a la posición inicial de un press de banca con barra.  Sin embargo, esta vez su agarre será neutral (con las palmas hacia el torso).
Asegúrate de que la mano que no está utilizando para levantar el peso esté colocada a su lado.
Comienza el ejercicio bajando la barra hasta que tu codo toque el suelo.  Asegúrate de inhalar ya que esta es la parte excéntrica (la parte de descenso del ejercicio).
Luego comience a levantar la barra hasta la posición inicial original.  Recuerde exhalar durante la parte concéntrica (parte de elevación del ejercicio).
Repite hasta que haya realizado las repeticiones recomendadas.
Cambia de brazo y repite el movimiento.
Variaciones: También puedes realizar este ejercicio utilizando mancuernas.  Al utilizar mancuernas podrás aislar tu pecho y añadir algo de variedad a tus entrenamientos.

Precaución: cuando haya terminado, no deje caer la barra o mancuerna a su lado, ya que esto es peligroso para el manguito rotador de los hombros y para otras personas que hacen ejercicio a su alrededor.  Una mejor manera de hacerlo es usar ambas manos para agarrar la barra o mancuerna y colocarla a su lado.  Simplemente aleje la barra o mancuerna del brazo que está ejercitando antes de dejar caer las pesas.  Esto garantizará una seguridad óptima y evitará lesiones.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Triceps Extension
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weight beside your chest. Press the dumbbell towards the ceiling with an underhand grip (palm facing your head) until you have nearly locked out your elbow, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joint. With your left arm you should be supporting your right elbow. This will be your starting position.

Maintaining this slight flex at your elbow, inhale and bend at your right elbow creating an arcing motion with the dumbbell so that your hand is heading towards your forehead. The weight should be stretching your triceps. Remember your upper arm shouldn't move throughout.
Once the dumbbell is just off your forehead pause for a brief moment, exhale and return the dumbbell and your hand along the same path to the starting position.
Pause for a second and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions before swapping sides.
Variations: Tricep Extension (Rope) or Bench Dips.

name.es: Extensión de tríceps a un brazo con mancuerna

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weight beside your chest. Press the dumbbell towards the ceiling with an underhand grip (palm facing your head) until you have nearly locked out your elbow, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joint. With your left arm you should be supporting your right elbow. This will be your starting position.

Maintaining this slight flex at your elbow, inhale and bend at your right elbow creating an arcing motion with the dumbbell so that your hand is heading towards your forehead. The weight should be stretching your triceps. Remember your upper arm shouldn't move throughout.
Once the dumbbell is just off your forehead pause for a brief moment, exhale and return the dumbbell and your hand along the same path to the starting position.
Pause for a second and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions before swapping sides.
Variations: Tricep Extension (Rope) or Bench Dips.
es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y siéntate en un banco plano. Acuéstate y lleva el peso al lado de tu pecho. Empuja la mancuerna hacia el techo con un agarre prono (con la palma hacia la cabeza) hasta que casi haya bloqueado el codo; debe haber una ligera curvatura para preservar la articulación. Con tu brazo izquierdo debes estar apoyando tu codo derecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo esta ligera flexión en el codo, inhale y doble el codo derecho creando un movimiento de arco con la mancuerna de modo que su mano se dirija hacia la frente. El peso debe estirar los tríceps. Recuerde que la parte superior de tu brazo no debe moverse en todo momento.
Una vez que la mancuerna esté justo fuera de tu frente, haz una pausa por un breve momento, exhala y regresa la mancuerna y la mano por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Haz una pausa por un segundo y repita la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones antes de cambiar de lado.
Variaciones: Extensión de tríceps (cuerda) o fondos en banco.

name: Side Laterals to Front Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt an upright, standing position. Have your arms at full extension, relaxed by your sides.
Next, whilst maintaining a slight bend at your elbows, exhale and lift the dumbbells out in front of you until they are at shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Again, exhale but this time lift the dumbbells out laterally to your sides, pause when you get to shoulder level.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Continue to alternate in this fashion until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Arnold Press or Bradford:Rocky Presses.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt an upright, standing position. Have your arms at full extension, relaxed by your sides.
Next, whilst maintaining a slight bend at your elbows, exhale and lift the dumbbells out in front of you until they are at shoulder height.

Again, exhale but this time lift the dumbbells out laterally to your sides, pause when you get to shoulder level.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.

es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una posición erguida y de pie. Mantén los brazos completamente extendidos, relajados a los lados.
A continuación, mientras mantienes una ligera flexión en los codos, exhala y levanta las mancuernas frente a ti hasta que estén a la altura de los hombros.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las pesas a tu costado.
Nuevamente, exhale, pero esta vez levante las mancuernas lateralmente hacia los costados, haga una pausa cuando llegue al nivel de los hombros.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las pesas a tu costado.
Continúa alternando de esta manera hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Arnold Press sentado o Bradford:Rocky Presses.

name: Standing Dumbbell See Saw Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing shoulder width stance. Bring the dumbbells in towards your chest with your palms facing your torso. This is your starting position.

Exhale and press one of the dumbbells straight up and above your head towards the ceiling, rotating your wrist as you go. Your palm should now be facing forwards with your arm at full extension (keep a slight bend at your elbow). As you press the dumbbell, lean slightly towards the opposite side to enhance the 'see-saw' action.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position.
Alternate as you go and complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Dumbbell Press or Kettlebell Arnold Press.

name.es: Press alterno tipo see-saw con mancuernas de pie

es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopte una postura de pie a la altura de los hombros. Lleva las mancuernas hacia tu pecho con las palmas hacia el torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Exhala y presiona una de las mancuernas hacia arriba y por encima de tu cabeza hacia el techo, girando la muñeca durante el movimientos. La palma de la mano ahora debe mirar hacia adelante con el brazo completamente extendido (mantenga el codo ligeramente doblado). Mientras presionas la mancuerna, inclínate ligeramente hacia el lado opuesto para mejorar la acción de "balancín".
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Alterne durante el movimiento y complete la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Arnold Dumbbell Press o Kettlebell Arnold Press.

name: Seated Dumbbell Lat Raises
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and take a seat on a bench. Have your arms by your side at full extension, palms facing each other. This will be your starting position.
Whilst maintaining a stationary torso, elbows slightly bent and exhaling throughout, lift the dumbbells out to your sides (on a wide arc) until they are parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause at the top, return the dumbbells to the starting position along the same path.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Standing Dumbbell Lat Raises or Cable Lateral Raises.

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and take a seat on a bench. Have your arms by your side at full extension, palms facing each other. This will be your starting position.
Whilst maintaining a stationary torso, elbows slightly bent and exhaling throughout, lift the dumbbells out to your sides (on a wide arc) until they are parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause at the top, return the dumbbells to the starting position along the same path.

es: Coge un par de mancuernas y siéntate en un banco. Mantén los brazos a los lados en extensión completa, con las palmas una frente a la otra. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras mantiene el torso inmóvil, con los codos ligeramente flexionados y exhala, levante las mancuernas hacia los lados (en un arco amplio) hasta que queden paralelas al suelo.
Después de una breve pausa en la cima, regresa las mancuernas a la posición inicial por el mismo camino.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Elevaciones laterales con mancuernas de pie o Elevaciones laterales con cable.

name: Seated Single Arm Wrist Curls Palm Up
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical. Adopt an underhand grip (palm facing the ceiling), with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle. Next you will need to place the back of your wrist on the end of your right knee so that the dumbbell is not in contact with your body and relaxed towards to floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbell upwards so that you are curling your palm towards your torso. Keep your wrist in contact with your knee throughout the movement.
Continue on an upward motion until your forearm is optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variation: Palms-Up Barbell Wrist Curls Over A Bench.

name.en: Seated Single Arm Wrist Curls Palm Up
name.es: Curl de muñeca a un brazo sentado, palma arriba

en: forearms
es: antebrazos

en: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical. Adopt an underhand grip (palm facing the ceiling), with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle. Next you will need to place the back of your wrist on the end of your right knee so that the dumbbell is not in contact with your body and relaxed towards to floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbell upwards so that you are curling your palm towards your torso. Keep your wrist in contact with your knee throughout the movement.
Continue on an upward motion until your forearm is optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variation: Palms-Up Barbell Wrist Curls Over A Bench.
es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y siéntate en un banco justo fuera de la vertical. Adopte un agarre supino (con la palma hacia el techo), con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados. A continuación, deberás colocar la parte posterior de tu muñeca en el extremo de tu rodilla derecha para que la mancuerna no esté en contacto con tu cuerpo y esté relajada hacia el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y doble la mancuerna hacia arriba de modo que doble la palma hacia el torso. Mantén su muñeca en contacto con su rodilla durante todo el movimiento.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que su antebrazo esté óptimamente contraído.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variación: Flexiones de muñeca con barra y palmas hacia arriba sobre un banco.

aliases: Seated One-Arm Dumbbell Palms-Up Wrist Curl
Seated Single Arm Wrist Curls Palm Up

name: Seated Single Arm Wrist Curls Palm Down
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical. Adopt an overhand grip (palm facing the floor), with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle. Next you will need to place your wrist on the end of your right knee so that the dumbbell is not in contact with your body and relaxed towards to floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbell upwards so that you are curling the back of your hand towards your torso. Keep your wrist in contact with your knee throughout the movement.
Continue on an upward motion until your forearm is optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variation: Seated Palms-Down Barbell Wrist Curls.

name.en: Seated Single Arm Wrist Curls Palm Down

en: forearms
es: antebrazos

Next you will need to place your wrist on the end of your right knee so that the dumbbell is not in contact with your body and relaxed towards to floor. This will be your starting position.

es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y siéntate en un banco justo fuera de la vertical. Adopte un agarre prono (con la palma hacia el suelo), con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados. A continuación, deberás colocar la muñeca en el extremo de la rodilla derecha para que la mancuerna no esté en contacto con tu cuerpo y esté relajada hacia el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y doble la mancuerna hacia arriba de modo que doble el dorso de la mano hacia el torso. Mantén su muñeca en contacto con su rodilla durante todo el movimiento.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que su antebrazo esté óptimamente contraído.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variación: Curl de muñeca con barra, sentado, con las palmas hacia abajo.

aliases: Seated One-Arm Dumbbell Palms-Down Wrist Curl
Seated Single Arm Wrist Curls Palm Down

name: Standing Shoulder Press (Dumbbell)
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press the dumbbells above your head so that you arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbells until they reach the side of your head (parallel with your ears), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbows. Inhale on the downward motion and flare your elbows out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbells back along this path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name.es: Press de hombros de pie con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press the dumbbells above your head so that you arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbells until they reach the side of your head (parallel with your ears), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbows. Inhale on the downward motion and flare your elbows out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbells back along this path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Sin inclinarse hacia atrás ni poner en peligro su postura, presione las mancuernas por encima de su cabeza para que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos, pero ligeramente flexionados/doblados a la altura de los codos. Asegúrate de que sus palmas estén mirando hacia adelante en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Lentamente y de forma controlada, desciende las mancuernas hasta llegar al costado de tu cabeza (paralelo a tus orejas), creando un ángulo de 90 grados en tus codos. Inhale con el movimiento hacia abajo y abra bien los codos.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y empuja las mancuernas hacia atrás a lo largo de este camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de hombros sentado con mancuernas o Press de hombros con cable.

name: Seated Wrist Curls Palms Up
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical. Adopt an underhand grip (palms facing the ceiling), with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle. Next you will need to place the back of your wrists on the ends of your knees so that the dumbbells are not in contact with your body and relaxed towards to floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells upwards so that you are curling your palms towards your torso. Keep your wrists in contact with your knees throughout the movement.
Continue on an upward motion until your forearms are optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Palms-Up Barbell Wrist Curls Over A Bench.

es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco justo fuera de la vertical. Adopte un agarre supino (con las palmas hacia el techo), con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados. A continuación, deberás colocar la parte posterior de las muñecas en los extremos de las rodillas para que las mancuernas no estén en contacto con tu cuerpo y estén relajadas hacia el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y doble las mancuernas hacia arriba de modo que doble las palmas hacia el torso. Mantén sus muñecas en contacto con sus rodillas durante todo el movimiento.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que sus antebrazos estén óptimamente contraídos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Flexiones de muñeca con barra y palmas hacia arriba sobre un banco.

name: Seated Wrist Curls Palms Down
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing the floor), with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle. Next you will need to place your wrists on the ends of your knees so that the dumbbells are not in contact with your body and relaxed towards to floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells upwards so that you are pulling the back of your hands towards your torso. Keep your wrists in contact with your knees throughout the movement.
Continue on an upward motion until your forearms are optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Seated Palms-Down Barbell Wrist Curls.

A continuación, deberás colocar las muñecas en los extremos de las rodillas para que las mancuernas no estén en contacto con tu cuerpo y estén relajadas hacia el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y flexiona las mancuernas hacia arriba de modo que jales el dorso de las manos hacia el torso. Mantén sus muñecas en contacto con sus rodillas durante todo el movimiento.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que sus antebrazos estén óptimamente contraídos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.

Variación: Curl de muñeca con barra, sentado, con las palmas hacia abajo.

name: Seated Dumbbell Inner Biceps Curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor, by your sides with an underhand grip (palms facing away from you). This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells both up and outward whilst maintaining your underhand grip.
Continue on an upward motion until your biceps are optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Wide-Grip Standing Barbell Curls or Concentration Curls.

name.es: Curl interno de bíceps con mancuernas sentado

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a bench just off vertical. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor, by your sides with an underhand grip (palms facing away from you). This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells both up and outward whilst maintaining your underhand grip.
Continue on an upward motion until your biceps are optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Wide-Grip Standing Barbell Curls or Concentration Curls.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco justo fuera de la vertical. Deja que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo, a los lados con un agarre supino (con las palmas hacia afuera). Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y doble las mancuernas hacia arriba y hacia afuera mientras mantiene el agarre supino.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que sus bíceps estén óptimamente contraídos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl con barra de pie con agarre ancho o Curl de concentración.

name: Seated Tricep Kickbacks
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on the end of a bench. Whilst maintaining a straight back, you should lean forward from your hips until your torso is almost parallel with the floor. Have your knees bent at 90 degrees and your elbows pinned in to the side of your torso. Your elbows should be at 90 degrees at this point. This is your starting position.

Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells on an arcing motion behind you. Exhale as you do so and continue to lift the dumbbells until your forearms are parallel to the floor and your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Only your forearms should move.
After a brief pause, slowly lower the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Extensions (Rope) or Dips - Triceps Version.

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on the end of a bench. Whilst maintaining a straight back, you should lean forward from your hips until your torso is almost parallel with the floor. Have your knees bent at 90 degrees and your elbows pinned in to the side of your torso. Your elbows should be at 90 degrees at this point. This is your starting position.

Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells on an arcing motion behind you. Exhale as you do so and continue to lift the dumbbells until your forearms are parallel to the floor and your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Only your forearms should move.
After a brief pause, slowly lower the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Extensions (Rope) or Dips - Triceps Version.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate al final de un banco. Mientras mantienes la espalda recta, debes inclinarte hacia adelante desde las caderas hasta que tu torso quede casi paralelo al suelo. Mantén las rodillas dobladas a 90 grados y los codos inmovilizados a los lados del torso. En este punto, tus codos deben estar a 90 grados. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles, usa los tríceps para levantar las mancuernas con un movimiento de arco detrás de ti. Exhala mientras lo haces y continúa levantando las mancuernas hasta que tus antebrazos queden paralelos al suelo y tus codos completamente extendidos. Consejo: solo deben moverse tus antebrazos.
Después de una breve pausa, baje lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Extensiones de Tríceps (Cuerda) o Fondos - Versión Tríceps.

aliases: Seated Bent-Over Two-Arm Dumbbell Triceps Extension

name: Scapular Retraction
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms and shoulders to relax and hang perpendicular to the floor with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract the muscles across the top of your back and pull your shoulder blades together (retracting your shoulders).
After a brief pause, inhale as you lower the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Row or Cable Row.

en: middle back
es: espalda media

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms and shoulders to relax and hang perpendicular to the floor with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract the muscles across the top of your back and pull your shoulder blades together (retracting your shoulders).
After a brief pause, inhale as you lower the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Row or Cable Row.
es: Coge un par de mancuernas y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que sus brazos y hombros se relajen y cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo con un agarre neutral (con las palmas una frente a la otra). Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco para que solo se apoye su torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhala, contraiga los músculos de la parte superior de la espalda y junte los omóplatos (retrayendo los hombros).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala mientras bajas las mancuernas por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: remo con barra o remo con cable.

name: Reverse Plate Curls
instructions: Grab a weight plate with an overhand pinched grip (palms facing your body), and allow your arms the hang perpendicular to the floor in front of you. Adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. This will be your starting position.
Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the weight plate upward toward your shoulders by flexing your biceps. Exhale as you do so and remember, only your forearms should move.
Continue in this fashion until your biceps are fully flexed and the weight plate is as high as it can be.
Pause for a brief moment and then return the plate back along the same path toward the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Reverse Barbell Preacher Curls or Reverse Cable Curls.

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Grab a weight plate with an overhand pinched grip (palms facing your body), and allow your arms the hang perpendicular to the floor in front of you. Adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. This will be your starting position.
Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the weight plate upward toward your shoulders by flexing your biceps. Exhale as you do so and remember, only your forearms should move.
Continue in this fashion until your biceps are fully flexed and the weight plate is as high as it can be.
Pause for a brief moment and then return the plate back along the same path toward the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Reverse Barbell Preacher Curls or Reverse Cable Curls.
es: Agarra una disco de peso con un agarre prono (con las palmas hacia el cuerpo) y deje que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo frente a ti. Adopte una posición de pie con una postura a la altura de los hombros y la espalda recta. Mantén los codos inmovilizados cerca del torso durante todo el ejercicio. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras mantiene la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles, doble el disco de pesas hacia los hombros flexionando los bíceps. Exhala mientras lo haces y recuerda, sólo tus antebrazos deben moverse.
Continúa de esta manera hasta que sus bíceps estén completamente flexionados y el disco de pesas esté lo más alto posible.
Haz una pausa por un breve momento y luego regrese el disco por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl predicador con barra invertida o Curl con cable inverso.

name: Seated Dumbbell Rear Delt Flyes Overhand Grip
instructions: To begin, lie down on an incline bench set at a 30-degree angle with the chest and stomach pressing against the incline.

Have the dumbbells in each hand with the palms facing down to the floor.  Your arms should be in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the angle of the bench. Tip: Your elbows should have a slight bend.  The legs should be stationary while applying pressure with the ball of your toes (your heels should not be touching the floor).  This is the starting position.
Maintaining the slight bend of the elbows, move the weights out and away from each other in an arc motion while exhaling.

As you lift the weight, your wrist should externally rotate by 90-degrees so that you go from a palms down (pronated) grip to a palms facing each other (neutral) grip. Tip: Try to squeeze your shoulder blades together to get the best results from this exercise.
The arms should be elevated until they are level with the head.
Feel the contraction and slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.en: Seated Dumbbell Rear Delt Flyes Overhand Grip
name.es: Pájaros para deltoide posterior sentado con mancuernas, agarre prono

en: shoulders

Have the dumbbells in each hand with the palms facing down to the floor.  Your arms should be in front of you so that they are perpendicular to the angle of the bench. Tip: Your elbows should have a slight bend.  The legs should be stationary while applying pressure with the ball of your toes (your heels should not be touching the floor).  This is the starting position.
Maintaining the slight bend of the elbows, move the weights out and away from each other in an arc motion while exhaling.

As you lift the weight, your wrist should externally rotate by 90-degrees so that you go from a palms down (pronated) grip to a palms facing each other (neutral) grip. Tip: Try to squeeze your shoulder blades together to get the best results from this exercise.
The arms should be elevated until they are level with the head.
Feel the contraction and slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Para comenzar, acuéstese en un banco inclinado colocado en un ángulo de 30 grados con el pecho y el abdomen presionando contra la inclinación.

Tenga las mancuernas en cada mano con las palmas hacia el suelo.  Tus brazos deben estar frente a ti de modo que queden perpendiculares al ángulo del banco. Consejo: Tus codos deben estar ligeramente doblados.  Las piernas deben estar estacionarias mientras se aplica presión con la punta de los dedos de los pies (los talones no deben tocar el suelo).  Esta es la posición inicial.
Manteniendo la ligera flexión de los codos, mueva las pesas hacia afuera y alejándolas entre sí en un movimiento de arco mientras exhala.

A medida que levanta el peso, su muñeca debe girar externamente 90 grados para pasar de un agarre con las palmas hacia abajo (pronación) a un agarre con las palmas enfrentadas (neutral). Consejo: intente juntar los omóplatos para obtener los mejores resultados de este ejercicio.
Los brazos deben estar elevados hasta que queden a la altura de la cabeza.
Siente la contracción y baja lentamente las pesas hasta la posición inicial mientras inhalas.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

aliases: Seated Dumbbell Rear Delt Flyes Overhand Grip

name: Seated Dumbbell Rear Delt Flyes
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat at the end of a bench. Lean forward from your waist whilst maintaining you posture. Lean as far as you can and allow the dumbbells to take their position behind your calves. At this point, your chest should be close to your knees and your palms should be facing one another. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining good posture, bring the dumbbells out on a wide arc until your arms are parallel to the floor. Ensure you have a slight bend at the elbows and you are exhaling throughout this portion of the movement.
After a brief pause, slowly descend the dumbbells along the same path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cable Rear Delt Flyes or Rear Delt Flye Machine.

name.es: Pájaros para deltoide posterior sentado con mancuernas

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat at the end of a bench. Lean forward from your waist whilst maintaining you posture. Lean as far as you can and allow the dumbbells to take their position behind your calves. At this point, your chest should be close to your knees and your palms should be facing one another. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining good posture, bring the dumbbells out on a wide arc until your arms are parallel to the floor. Ensure you have a slight bend at the elbows and you are exhaling throughout this portion of the movement.
After a brief pause, slowly descend the dumbbells along the same path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cable Rear Delt Flyes or Rear Delt Flye Machine.
es: Coge dos mancuernas y siéntate al final de un banco. Inclínese hacia adelante desde la cintura mientras mantiene la postura. Inclínate lo más que puedas y deja que las mancuernas se posicionen detrás de tus gemelos. En este punto, tu pecho debe estar cerca de tus rodillas y tus palmas deben estar una frente a la otra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes una buena postura, saca las mancuernas formando un amplio arco hasta que tus brazos queden paralelos al suelo. Asegúrate de tener una ligera flexión en los codos y de exhalar durante esta parte del movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, desciende lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Cable Rear Delt Flyes o Máquina de Delt Flyes trasero.

aliases: Seated Bent Over Rear Delt Flyes
Seated Bent Over Rear Delt Raises

name: Dumbbell Sumo Squats
instructions: Grab a dumbbell by one of its ends in both hands and stand up straight. Maintain this straight posture throughout the movement and your arms remain passive and extended. Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly facing outwards. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend by bending at your knees. Remember to keep your knees behind your toes and put most of your weight through your heels. The dumbbell should now be just off the floor with your arms being between your legs.
After a brief pause, Push through your heels and thighs to bring your torso back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Make sure to maintain posture as failure to do so could result in injury.
Variations: Wide Stance Leg Press or Kettlebell Sumo Squats.

en: Grab a dumbbell by one of its ends in both hands and stand up straight. Maintain this straight posture throughout the movement and your arms remain passive and extended. Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly facing outwards. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend by bending at your knees. Remember to keep your knees behind your toes and put most of your weight through your heels. The dumbbell should now be just off the floor with your arms being between your legs.
After a brief pause, Push through your heels and thighs to bring your torso back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Make sure to maintain posture as failure to do so could result in injury.
Variations: Wide Stance Leg Press or Kettlebell Sumo Squats.
es: Agarra una mancuerna por uno de sus extremos con ambas manos y párate derecho. Mantén esta postura recta durante todo el movimiento y tus brazos permanecen pasivos y extendidos. Adopte una postura amplia con los dedos de los pies ligeramente hacia afuera. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhale mientras desciende doblando las rodillas. Recuerde mantener las rodillas detrás de los dedos de los pies y poner la mayor parte de su peso en los talones. La mancuerna ahora debería estar apenas separada del suelo con los brazos entre las piernas.
Después de una breve pausa, empuja los talones y los muslos para que el torso vuelva a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: asegúrate de mantener la postura, ya que no hacerlo podría provocar lesiones.
Variaciones: Press de piernas en posición amplia o sentadillas sumo con pesas rusas.

name: Plate Pinch
instructions: Stand two weight plates up beside one another on the floor next to you. Adopt a standing shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, bend down (remember to bend your knees and lift through your legs) to pick up the weight plates by pinching them together. Do not use the handles, pinch the plate themselves between your fingers and thumb. Return to your standing position and pinch the plates firmly for the recommended amount of time before returning them to the floor. Swap side and repeat the process.

en: forearms
es: antebrazos

en: Stand two weight plates up beside one another on the floor next to you. Adopt a standing shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, bend down (remember to bend your knees and lift through your legs) to pick up the weight plates by pinching them together. Do not use the handles, pinch the plate themselves between your fingers and thumb. Return to your standing position and pinch the plates firmly for the recommended amount of time before returning them to the floor. Swap side and repeat the process.
es: Coloca dos discos de pesas uno al lado del otro en el suelo junto a ti. Adopte una postura de pie a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inclínese (recuerde doblar las rodillas y levantar las piernas) para levantar los discos de pesas pellizcándolos. No utilice las asas, pellizque el disco entre los dedos y el pulgar. Vuelva a su posición de pie y pellizque los discos firmemente durante el tiempo recomendado antes de devolverlas al suelo. Cambia de lado y repite el proceso.

name: Wrist Curls Over A Bench Palms Up
instructions: Grab a two dumbbells and kneel down next to a bench. Lean over the bench so that your forearms are supported with your wrists over hanging (dumbbells in hand). Adopt a 'palms up' grip. This will be your starting position. Tip: Only your wrists should move when performing this exercise.
Exhale and curl your palms in towards your forearms.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your wrists along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Palms Up Barbell Wrist Curls.

name.en: Wrist Curls Over A Bench Palms Up
name.es: Curl de muñeca en banco, palmas arriba

en: forearms
es: antebrazos

en: Grab a two dumbbells and kneel down next to a bench. Lean over the bench so that your forearms are supported with your wrists over hanging (dumbbells in hand). Adopt a 'palms up' grip. This will be your starting position. Tip: Only your wrists should move when performing this exercise.

es: Coge dos mancuernas y arrodíllate junto a un banco. Inclínate sobre el banco de modo que tus antebrazos queden apoyados con las muñecas colgando (mancuernas en mano). Adopte un agarre con las palmas hacia arriba. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: Sólo tus muñecas deben moverse al realizar este ejercicio.
Exhala y dobla las palmas hacia los antebrazos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las muñecas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Flexiones de muñeca con barra y palmas hacia arriba.

aliases: Palms-Up Dumbbell Wrist Curl Over A Bench

name: Wrist Curls Over A Bench Palms Down

Adopt an overhand 'palms facing down' grip. This will be your starting position. Tip: Only your wrists should move when performing this exercise.
Exhale and curl the back of your hands up towards your forearms.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your hands along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Palms Up Barbell Wrist Curls or Palms Up Dumbbell Wrist Curls.

name: One Arm Supinated Dumbbell Triceps Extension
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weight beside your chest. Press the dumbbell towards the ceiling with an underhand grip (palm facing your head) until you have nearly locked out your elbow, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joint. With your left arm you should be supporting your right elbow. This will be your starting position.

Maintaining this slight flex at your elbow, inhale and bend at your right elbow creating an arcing motion with the dumbbell so that your hand is heading towards your forehead. The weight should be stretching your triceps. Remember your upper arm shouldn't move throughout.
Once the dumbbell is just off your forehead pause for a brief moment, exhale and return the dumbbell and your hand along the same path to the starting position.
Pause for a second and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions before swapping sides.
Variations: Overhead Tricep Rope Extension or Bench Dips.

With your left arm you should be supporting your right elbow. This will be your starting position.

es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y siéntate en un banco plano. Acuéstate y lleva el peso al lado de tu pecho. Empuja la mancuerna hacia el techo con un agarre prono (con la palma hacia la cabeza) hasta que casi haya bloqueado el codo; debe haber una ligera curvatura para preservar la articulación. Con tu brazo izquierdo debes estar apoyando tu codo derecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo esta ligera flexión en el codo, inhale y doble el codo derecho creando un movimiento de arco con la mancuerna de modo que su mano se dirija hacia la frente. El peso debe estirar los tríceps. Recuerde que la parte superior de tu brazo no debe moverse en todo momento.
Una vez que la mancuerna esté justo fuera de tu frente, haz una pausa por un breve momento, exhala y regresa la mancuerna y la mano por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Haz una pausa por un segundo y repita la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones antes de cambiar de lado.
Variaciones: Extensión de cuerda de tríceps sobre la cabeza o fondos en banco.

aliases: One Arm Supinated Dumbbell Triceps Extension

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Preacher Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a preacher curl machine. Place your right upper arm over the pad of the machine with your palm facing your shoulder. Start With the bicep fully contracted and the dumbbell close to your shoulder. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the dumbbell until your upper arm is extended and your bicep is fully stretched.
Exhale and contract your bicep to lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Squeeze your bicep for a second at the contracted position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch hands and repeat the movement with your left arm.
Variations: Single Arm Cable Curl or Neutral Grip Preacher Curl.

name.es: Curl predicador a un brazo con mancuerna

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a preacher curl machine. Place your right upper arm over the pad of the machine with your palm facing your shoulder. Start With the bicep fully contracted and the dumbbell close to your shoulder. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the dumbbell until your upper arm is extended and your bicep is fully stretched.

Squeeze your bicep for a second at the contracted position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch hands and repeat the movement with your left arm.
Variations: Single Arm Cable Curl or Neutral Grip Preacher Curl.
es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y siéntate en una máquina de curl predicador. Coloca la parte superior del brazo derecho sobre la almohadilla de la máquina con la palma hacia el hombro. Comienza con el bíceps completamente contraído y la mancuerna cerca de tu hombro. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, baje lentamente la mancuerna hasta que la parte superior del brazo esté extendida y el bíceps esté completamente estirado.
Exhala y contrae el bíceps para levantar la mancuerna hasta la posición inicial.
Aprieta tu bíceps por un segundo en la posición contraída y repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Cambia de mano y repite el movimiento con el brazo izquierdo.
Variaciones: Curl con cable de un solo brazo o Curl predicador con agarre neutro.

name: Single Arm Lateral Raise Against Bench
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay on your right side on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees). Have your left arm extended (with a slight bend at your elbow) and allow the dumbbell to rest of your left thigh as you adopt an overhand grip (palm facing the floor). This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and elevate your left arm towards the ceiling. Keep lifting your arm and the dumbbell until the muscles in your shoulder are at peak contraction.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Single Arm Lateral Raise or Cable Lateral Raise.

name.en: Single Arm Lateral Raise Against Bench
name.es: Elevación lateral a un brazo apoyado contra banco

en: shoulders
es: hombros

This will be your starting position.

After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to its starting position.
