es: Coge una mancuerna en su mano izquierda y recuéstese sobre su lado derecho en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados). Mantén el brazo izquierdo extendido (con una ligera flexión en el codo) y permita que la mancuerna descanse sobre su muslo izquierdo mientras adopta un agarre prono (con la palma hacia el suelo). Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y eleva tu brazo izquierdo hacia el techo. Continúa levantando el brazo y la mancuerna hasta que los músculos del hombro estén en máxima contracción.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: elevación lateral con un solo brazo o elevación lateral con cable.

aliases: Single Arm Lateral Raise Against Bench

name: One-Arm Flat Bench Dumbbell Flye
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weight beside your chest. Press the dumbbell towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palm facing inwards towards your body) until you have nearly locked out your elbow, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joint. Place your left arm across your torso for stability. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining this slight flex at your elbow, lower your arm in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so. Your arm should be parallel with the floor at this point.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles and bring your arm back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Cable Crossover or Pec Deck.

name.es: Apertura con mancuerna a un brazo en banco plano

en: chest
es: pecho

en: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weight beside your chest. Press the dumbbell towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palm facing inwards towards your body) until you have nearly locked out your elbow, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joint. Place your left arm across your torso for stability. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining this slight flex at your elbow, lower your arm in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so. Your arm should be parallel with the floor at this point.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles and bring your arm back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.

es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y siéntate en un banco plano. Acuéstate y lleva el peso al lado de tu pecho. Empuja la mancuerna hacia el techo con un agarre neutral (con la palma hacia adentro, hacia tu cuerpo) hasta que casi haya bloqueado el codo; debe haber una ligera flexión para preservar la articulación. Coloca tu brazo izquierdo sobre su torso para mayor estabilidad. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo esta ligera flexión en el codo, baje el brazo formando un amplio arco hasta que sienta que el pecho se estira, inhale mientras lo haces. En este punto, tu brazo debe estar paralelo al suelo.
Siguiendo el mismo camino por el que bajaste, aprieta los músculos pectorales y lleva el brazo a la posición inicial, recordando exhalar durante el movimientos.
Haz una pausa por un segundo y luego repita la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones e intercambie lados.
Variaciones: Cable Crossover o Pec Deck.

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand on top of your thigh.

By using your thigh to help you get the dumbbell up, clean the dumbbell up so that you can hold it in front of you at shoulder width.  Use the hand you are not lifting with to help position the dumbbell over you properly.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrist forward so that the palm of your hand is facing away from you.  This will be your starting position.

Bring down the weights slowly to your side as you breathe in.  Keep full control of the dumbbell at all times.  Tip: Use the hand that you are not lifting with to help keep the dumbbell balance as you may struggle a bit at first.  Only use your non-lifting hand if it is needed.  Otherwise, keep it resting to the side.

As you breathe out, push the dumbbells up using your pectoral muscles.  Lock your arms in the contracted position, squeeze your chest, hold for a second and then start coming down slowly.  Tip: It should take at least twice as long to go down than to come up.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions of your training program.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.
Caution: When you are done, do not drop the dumbbell next to you as this is dangerous to your rotator cuff in your shoulders and others working out around you.

Just lift your legs from the floor bending at the knees, twist your wrist so that you can place the dumbbell on top of your thigh.  When the dumbbell is touching your thigh simultaneously push your upper torso up (while pressing the dumbbell on your thigh) and also perform a slight kick forward with your legs (keeping the dumbbell on top of the thigh).  By doing this combined movement, momentum will help you get back to a sitting position with the dumbbell still on top of your thigh.  At this moment you can place the dumbbell on the floor.

name.es: Press de pecho a un brazo con mancuerna

When the dumbbell is touching your thigh simultaneously push your upper torso up (while pressing the dumbbell on your thigh) and also perform a slight kick forward with your legs (keeping the dumbbell on top of the thigh). es: Acuéstese en un banco plano con una mancuerna en una mano encima del muslo.

Usando el muslo para ayudarte a levantar la mancuerna, haz una cargada con ella para que puedas sostenerla frente a ti a la altura de los hombros.  Utilice la mano con la que no está levantando para ayudar a colocar la mancuerna sobre ti correctamente.
Una vez que esté al ancho de los hombros, gire la muñeca hacia adelante de modo que la palma de la mano quede en dirección opuesta a ti.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Baja las pesas lentamente hacia su costado mientras inhala. Mantén el control total de la mancuerna en todo momento.  Consejo: use la mano con la que no está levantando para ayudar a mantener el equilibrio con la mancuerna, ya que al principio puede resultarle un poco difícil.  Utilice únicamente la mano que no levanta si es necesario.  De lo contrario, manténgalo apoyado a un lado.

Mientras exhala, empuje las mancuernas hacia arriba usando los músculos pectorales.  Bloquea los brazos en posición contraída, aprieta el pecho, mantén la posición durante un segundo y luego comienza a bajar lentamente.  Consejo: debería tomar al menos el doble de tiempo bajar que subir.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones de su programa de entrenamiento.
Cambia de brazo y repite el movimiento.
Precaución: cuando haya terminado, no deje caer la mancuerna a su lado, ya que esto es peligroso para el manguito rotador de los hombros y para otras personas que hacen ejercicio a su alrededor.

Simplemente levante las piernas del suelo doblando las rodillas, gire la muñeca para poder colocar la mancuerna encima del muslo.  Cuando la mancuerna toque tu muslo, simultáneamente empuja la parte superior del torso hacia arriba (mientras presionas la mancuerna en tu muslo) y también realiza una ligera patada hacia adelante con las piernas (manteniendo la mancuerna en la parte superior del muslo).  Al hacer este movimiento combinado, el impulso te ayudará a volver a sentarte con la mancuerna todavía encima de tu muslo.  En este momento puedes colocar la mancuerna en el suelo.

name: Seated Single Arm Tricep Kickbacks
instructions: Grab a dumbbell and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bend your knees slightly and lean forward from your hips, maintaining a straight back. Continue to lean until your torso is just off parallel to the floor with your free hand leaning on a bench next to you. With the arm that holds the dumbbell, your elbow should be pinned close to your body with your forearm perpendicular to the floor. Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between your forearm and your upper arms. This is your starting position.
Keeping your upper arm close to your body and with a neutral grip, lift your forearm behind you until the elbows are fully extended. Exhale as you lift the dumbbell and squeeze your tricep as you go.
After a brief pause at the top of the contraction, slowly lower the dumbbell along the same path until it is back to the starting position. Inhale as you go.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Rope Tricep Extension or Skull Crushers

name.es: Patada de tríceps a un brazo sentado

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: Grab a dumbbell and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bend your knees slightly and lean forward from your hips, maintaining a straight back. Continue to lean until your torso is just off parallel to the floor with your free hand leaning on a bench next to you. With the arm that holds the dumbbell, your elbow should be pinned close to your body with your forearm perpendicular to the floor. Tip: There should be a 90-degree angle between your forearm and your upper arms. This is your starting position.
Keeping your upper arm close to your body and with a neutral grip, lift your forearm behind you until the elbows are fully extended. Exhale as you lift the dumbbell and squeeze your tricep as you go.
After a brief pause at the top of the contraction, slowly lower the dumbbell along the same path until it is back to the starting position. Inhale as you go.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Rope Tricep Extension or Skull Crushers
es: Coge una mancuerna y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Doble ligeramente las rodillas e inclínese hacia adelante desde las caderas, manteniendo la espalda recta. Continúa inclinándose hasta que su torso esté paralelo al suelo con su mano libre apoyada en un banco a su lado. Con el brazo que sostiene la mancuerna, el codo debe quedar pegado al cuerpo con el antebrazo perpendicular al suelo. Consejo: debe haber un ángulo de 90 grados entre el antebrazo y la parte superior de los brazos. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo la parte superior del brazo cerca del cuerpo y con un agarre neutral, levante el antebrazo detrás de ti hasta que los codos estén completamente extendidos. Exhala mientras levantas la mancuerna y aprieta el tríceps mientras avanzas.
Después de una breve pausa en la parte superior de la contracción, baje lentamente la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta volver a la posición inicial. Inhala mientras avanzas.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: extensión de tríceps con cuerda o trituradoras de cráneo

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Hammer Preacher Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a preacher curl machine. Place your right upper arm over the pad of the machine with your palm facing inwards (the dumbbell should be perpendicular to the floor). Start With the bicep fully contracted and the dumbbell close to your shoulder. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the dumbbell until your upper arm is extended and your bicep is fully stretched.
Exhale and contract your bicep to lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Squeeze your bicep for a second at the contracted position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch hands and repeat the movement with your left arm.
Variations: Single Arm Cable Curl or EZ Bar Preacher Curl.

name.en: Single Arm Dumbbell Hammer Preacher Curls

en: biceps
es: bíceps

es: antebrazos

en: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and take a seat on a preacher curl machine. Place your right upper arm over the pad of the machine with your palm facing inwards (the dumbbell should be perpendicular to the floor). Start With the bicep fully contracted and the dumbbell close to your shoulder. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, slowly lower the dumbbell until your upper arm is extended and your bicep is fully stretched.
Exhale and contract your bicep to lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Squeeze your bicep for a second at the contracted position and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Switch hands and repeat the movement with your left arm.
Variations: Single Arm Cable Curl or EZ Bar Preacher Curl.
es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y siéntate en una máquina de curl predicador. Coloca la parte superior del brazo derecho sobre la almohadilla de la máquina con la palma hacia adentro (la mancuerna debe estar perpendicular al suelo). Comienza con el bíceps completamente contraído y la mancuerna cerca de tu hombro. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, baje lentamente la mancuerna hasta que la parte superior del brazo esté extendida y el bíceps esté completamente estirado.
Exhala y contrae el bíceps para levantar la mancuerna hasta la posición inicial.
Aprieta tu bíceps por un segundo en la posición contraída y repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Cambia de mano y repite el movimiento con el brazo izquierdo.
Variaciones: Curl con cable de un solo brazo o Curl predicador con barra EZ.

aliases: Single Arm Dumbbell Hammer Preacher Curls

name: Standing Alternate Hammer Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your elbows tucked in, palms facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm, curl the left dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your bicep. Keep your elbow pinned to your side and exhale as you do so. Squeeze your bicep for a brief moment at the contracted position. Tip: Only the forearm should have moved.
After this brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell to the starting posiiton along the same path.
Repeat the movement with your right hand.
Continue alternating for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Hammer Curls or Seated Dumbbell Curls.

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: forearms
es: antebrazos

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your elbows tucked in, palms facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm, curl the left dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your bicep. Keep your elbow pinned to your side and exhale as you do so. Squeeze your bicep for a brief moment at the contracted position. Tip: Only the forearm should have moved.
After this brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell to the starting posiiton along the same path.
Repeat the movement with your right hand.
Continue alternating for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Hammer Curls or Seated Dumbbell Curls.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopte una posición de pie con los codos pegados al cuerpo y las palmas hacia el torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene la parte superior del brazo inmóvil, doble la mancuerna izquierda hacia el hombro contrayendo el bíceps. Mantén el codo pegado a su costado y exhale mientras lo haces. Aprieta tu bíceps por un breve momento en la posición contraída. Consejo: Sólo debería haberse movido el antebrazo.
Después de esta breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna a la posición inicial por el mismo camino.
Repite el movimiento con tu mano derecha.
Continúa alternando durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo sentado o Curl de mancuerna sentado.

name: Middle Back Shrug
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms and shoulders to relax and hang perpendicular to the floor with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract the muscles across the top of your back and pull your shoulder blades together (retracting your shoulders).
After a brief pause, inhale as you lower the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Row or Cable Row.

en: middle back
es: espalda media

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms and shoulders to relax and hang perpendicular to the floor with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract the muscles across the top of your back and pull your shoulder blades together (retracting your shoulders).
After a brief pause, inhale as you lower the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Row or Cable Row.
es: Coge un par de mancuernas y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que sus brazos y hombros se relajen y cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo con un agarre neutral (con las palmas una frente a la otra). Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco para que solo se apoye su torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhala, contraiga los músculos de la parte superior de la espalda y junte los omóplatos (retrayendo los hombros).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala mientras bajas las mancuernas por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: remo con barra o remo con cable.

name: Lying Supine Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and have an underhand grip (palms facing up). Next, lay down on a flat bench and allow your arms to hang beside you, as close to vertical from the floor as possible. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and curl the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Bicep Curls or Cable Curls.

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and have an underhand grip (palms facing up). Next, lay down on a flat bench and allow your arms to hang beside you, as close to vertical from the floor as possible. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and curl the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Bicep Curls or Cable Curls.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y sujétela por debajo (con las palmas hacia arriba). A continuación, recuéstese en un banco plano y deje que sus brazos cuelguen a su lado, lo más cerca posible de la vertical del suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhalas, contrae los bíceps y flexiona las mancuernas hasta la altura de los hombros. Mantén la contracción por un segundo mientras aprietas el bíceps. Consejo: Sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de bíceps con mancuernas o Curl con cable.

name: Lying Rear Delt Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your left arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported with your right arm, placed behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the ceiling.
Once the dumbbell is horizontal to the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Face Pulls or Rear Delt Machine Flyes.

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your left arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported with your right arm, placed behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the ceiling.
Once the dumbbell is horizontal to the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Face Pulls or Rear Delt Machine Flyes.
es: Coge una mancuerna en su mano izquierda y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que tu brazo izquierdo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo. Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco de modo que solo el torso quede apoyado con el brazo derecho, colocado detrás de la espalda. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inhala y tira el dorso de tu mano izquierda hacia el techo.
Una vez que la mancuerna esté horizontal con respecto al suelo, haga una pausa por un breve segundo, exhale y lentamente regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino, nuevamente a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Face Pulls o Flyes con máquina de deltoides posteriores.

name: Lying One-Arm Lateral Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay on a bench (on your right side). Lay with your left arm across your body, allowing the dumbbell to lay next to your right shoulder, palm facing your torso. This is your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the wall behind you, therefore opening up your torso.
Once the dumbbell is vertical from the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Face Pulls or Rear Delt Machine Flyes.

name.es: Elevación lateral a un brazo tumbado

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay on a bench (on your right side). Lay with your left arm across your body, allowing the dumbbell to lay next to your right shoulder, palm facing your torso. This is your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the wall behind you, therefore opening up your torso.
Once the dumbbell is vertical from the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Face Pulls or Rear Delt Machine Flyes.
es: Toma una mancuerna con tu mano izquierda y recuéstate en un banco (a tu lado derecho). Acuéstese con el brazo izquierdo sobre el cuerpo, permitiendo que la mancuerna quede al lado de su hombro derecho, con la palma hacia el torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Inhala y tira del dorso de tu mano izquierda hacia la pared detrás de ti, abriendo así tu torso.
Una vez que la mancuerna esté vertical desde el suelo, haga una pausa por un breve segundo, exhale y lentamente regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino, nuevamente a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Face Pulls o Flyes con máquina de deltoides posteriores.

name: Lying Face Up Plate Neck Resistance
instructions: Grab a weight plate and lay (face up) on a flat bench. Position your body so that your torso is supported by the bench but your head and neck are off the end. Gently, place the weight plate on your forehead, keeping hold of it for stability. Relax your neck so that your forehead is tilted back towards the floor. This is your starting position.
To initiate this movement, exhale and use the muscles in your neck to pull your head upward and attempt to get your chin on your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your head along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very cautious with the weight and avoid jerking motions at all costs!

name.en: Lying Face Up Plate Neck Resistance
name.es: Resistencia de cuello boca arriba con disco

en: neck
es: cuello

en: Grab a weight plate and lay (face up) on a flat bench. Position your body so that your torso is supported by the bench but your head and neck are off the end. Gently, place the weight plate on your forehead, keeping hold of it for stability. Relax your neck so that your forehead is tilted back towards the floor. This is your starting position.
To initiate this movement, exhale and use the muscles in your neck to pull your head upward and attempt to get your chin on your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your head along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very cautious with the weight and avoid jerking motions at all costs!
es: Coge un disco de pesas y recuéstese (boca arriba) en un banco plano. Coloca tu cuerpo de modo que su torso esté apoyado en el banco pero su cabeza y cuello estén fuera del extremo. Con cuidado, coloque el disco de pesas sobre su frente, sosteniéndola para mayor estabilidad. Relaje el cuello para que la frente quede inclinada hacia el suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar este movimiento, exhale y use los músculos del cuello para levantar la cabeza e intente colocar la barbilla en el pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la cabeza por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: ¡Ten mucho cuidado con el peso y evita a toda costa los movimientos bruscos!

aliases: Lying Face Up Plate Neck Resistance

name: Lying Face Down Plate Neck Resistance
instructions: Grab a weight plate and lay (face down) on a flat bench. Position your body so that your torso is supported by the bench but your head and neck are off the end. Gently, place the weight plate on the back of your head, keeping hold of it for stability. Relax your neck so that your forehead is tilted towards the floor. This is your starting position.
To initiate this movement, exhale and use the muscles in your neck to pull your head upward so you are looking forwards.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your head along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Be very cautious with the weight and avoid jerking motions at all costs!

name.en: Lying Face Down Plate Neck Resistance
name.es: Resistencia de cuello boca abajo con disco

en: neck
es: cuello

en: Grab a weight plate and lay (face down) on a flat bench. Position your body so that your torso is supported by the bench but your head and neck are off the end. Gently, place the weight plate on the back of your head, keeping hold of it for stability. Relax your neck so that your forehead is tilted towards the floor. This is your starting position.
To initiate this movement, exhale and use the muscles in your neck to pull your head upward so you are looking forwards.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your head along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.

es: Coge un disco de pesas y recuéstese (boca abajo) en un banco plano. Coloca tu cuerpo de modo que su torso esté apoyado en el banco pero su cabeza y cuello estén fuera del extremo. Con cuidado, coloque el disco de pesas en la parte posterior de su cabeza, manteniéndola sujeta para mayor estabilidad. Relaja el cuello para que la frente quede inclinada hacia el suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar este movimiento, exhale y use los músculos del cuello para tirar de la cabeza hacia arriba de modo que mire hacia adelante.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la cabeza por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: ¡Ten mucho cuidado con el peso y evita a toda costa los movimientos bruscos!

aliases: Lying Face Down Plate Neck Resistance

name: Lying Dumbbell Tricep Extension
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and lay flat on a bench with the dumbbells pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Adopt a pronated grip (palms facing away from you), with the ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another and your elbows tucked in. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the dumbbells down towards your forehead. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your forehead pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the dumbbells along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: EZ-Bar Skullcrushers or Tricep Rope Extensions.

name.es: Extensión de tríceps tumbado con mancuerna

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: Grab two dumbbells and lay flat on a bench with the dumbbells pressed straight up towards the ceiling. Adopt a pronated grip (palms facing away from you), with the ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another and your elbows tucked in. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend the dumbbells down towards your forehead. Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in. When you get to within an inch of your forehead pause for a second.
Then whilst exhaling, use your triceps to return the dumbbells along the same path to the starting position. Your arms should be fully extended once again and pointing towards the ceiling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: EZ-Bar Skullcrushers or Tricep Rope Extensions.
es: Coge dos mancuernas y recuéstese en un banco con las mancuernas extendidas hacia el techo. Adopte un agarre en pronación (con las palmas hacia afuera), con los extremos de las mancuernas tocándose suavemente y los codos pegados al cuerpo. Esta será su posición inicial.

Inhala mientras bajas las mancuernas hacia tu frente. Asegúrate de mantener la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles y los codos pegados al cuerpo. Cuando llegue a unos 2-3 cm de su frente, haga una pausa por un segundo.

Luego, mientras exhala, use sus tríceps para regresar las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos una vez más y apuntando hacia el techo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: barra EZ Skullcrushers o extensiones de cuerda para tríceps.

name: Single Arm Lateral Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell with your left hand and adopt a standing position with your arms at full extension, palm facing your thigh. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary position, lift the dumbbell on a wide arc away from your body until your arm becomes parallel with the floor. Have a slight bend at your elbow and exhale as you lift the weight.
As you inhale, return the dumbbell along the same path to it's starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap to your right side.
Variations: Lateral Raises (Double) or Seated Lateral Raises

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Grab a dumbbell with your left hand and adopt a standing position with your arms at full extension, palm facing your thigh. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary position, lift the dumbbell on a wide arc away from your body until your arm becomes parallel with the floor. Have a slight bend at your elbow and exhale as you lift the weight.
As you inhale, return the dumbbell along the same path to it's starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap to your right side.
Variations: Lateral Raises (Double) or Seated Lateral Raises
es: Coge una mancuerna con la mano izquierda y adopta una posición de pie con los brazos completamente extendidos y la palma hacia el muslo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene una posición estacionaria, levante la mancuerna formando un amplio arco lejos de tu cuerpo hasta que tu brazo quede paralelo al suelo. Doble ligeramente el codo y exhale mientras levanta el peso.
Mientras inhala, regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie hacia su lado derecho.
Variaciones: Elevaciones laterales (dobles) o Elevaciones laterales sentado

name: Dumbbell Iron Cross
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand, adopt and shoulder width stance with your arms out wide, at shoulder height (replicating a 'T' shape).
Next, inhale and bend at your hips and knees and descend into a squat position. Simultaneously, keeping your arms straight, bring the dumbbells in towards each other to meet in front of your body.

After a brief pause, exhale and press through your heels to extend at your knees and hips to bring yourself back up to a standing position. At the same time, retract your shoulder blades and return the dumbbells out wide, keeping your arms at full length.
Repeat for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cable Iron Cross.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand, adopt and shoulder width stance with your arms out wide, at shoulder height (replicating a 'T' shape).
Next, inhale and bend at your hips and knees and descend into a squat position. Simultaneously, keeping your arms straight, bring the dumbbells in towards each other to meet in front of your body.

After a brief pause, exhale and press through your heels to extend at your knees and hips to bring yourself back up to a standing position. At the same time, retract your shoulder blades and return the dumbbells out wide, keeping your arms at full length.
Repeat for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variation: Cable Iron Cross.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano, adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros con los brazos extendidos, a la altura de los hombros (replicando una forma de 'T').

A continuación, inhale, doble las caderas y las rodillas y descienda hasta ponerse en cuclillas. Al mismo tiempo, manteniendo los brazos rectos, acerque las mancuernas entre sí para que se junten frente a tu cuerpo.

Después de una breve pausa, exhale y presione con los talones para extender las rodillas y las caderas y volver a ponerse de pie. Al mismo tiempo, retraiga los omóplatos y regrese las mancuernas hacia afuera, manteniendo los brazos en toda su extensión.
Repite durante la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variación: Cable Cruz de Hierro.

name: Incline Hammer Curls
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat on an incline bench (around 45 degrees) with your arms by your side.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both dumbbells forward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat on an incline bench (around 45 degrees) with your arms by your side.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both dumbbells forward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.
es: Coge dos mancuernas y siéntate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 45 grados) con los brazos a los lados.
Las palmas de tus manos deben mirar hacia tu torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, exhala mientras flexionas ambas mancuernas hacia adelante, contrayendo los bíceps. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tus bíceps estén completamente contraídos y las mancuernas a la altura de los hombros. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo mientras aprietas los bíceps.
(Consejo: sólo deben moverse los antebrazos).
Inhale mientras comienza lentamente a bajar las mancuernas a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo de pie o Curl de cable.

name: Incline Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Incline Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press

name.es: Press de pecho inclinado con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Incline Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 grados), colocando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo.

Apriete los músculos pectorales cuando los brazos estén completamente extendidos. Una vez que haya completado esto, inhale y baje los brazos al lado del pecho hasta que los codos estén a 90 grados una vez más.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: siempre tenga un observador contigo para ayudarte durante todo el movimiento y para ayudar a descargar las mancuernas una vez finalizado.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith

name: Incline Dumbbell Flyes With A Twist
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and lie on an incline bench (chest facing the ceiling) that is set to an incline angle of around 30 degrees.
With a slight bend at the elbows, extend your arms towards the ceiling until they are nearly locked out.
Rotate your wrists so that your palms are now facing one another. This will be your starting position.

As you inhale, Lower your arms down on a wide arc as you rotate your wrists until you feel a stretch across your chest and the dumbbells are perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement to reduce stress on your joints.

Once you have reached the bottom of the movement, pause for a brief moment before exhaling and returning the dumbbells (along the same path) to their starting position, above your chest. At this point your arms should still be extended and the motion is controlled through your pectoral muscles.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Dumbbell Flyes or Pec Deck

name.en: Incline Dumbbell Flyes With A Twist
name.es: Aperturas inclinadas con mancuernas con giro

en: chest
es: pecho

en: shoulders

en: Grab two dumbbells and lie on an incline bench (chest facing the ceiling) that is set to an incline angle of around 30 degrees.
With a slight bend at the elbows, extend your arms towards the ceiling until they are nearly locked out.
Rotate your wrists so that your palms are now facing one another. This will be your starting position.

As you inhale, Lower your arms down on a wide arc as you rotate your wrists until you feel a stretch across your chest and the dumbbells are perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement to reduce stress on your joints.

Once you have reached the bottom of the movement, pause for a brief moment before exhaling and returning the dumbbells (along the same path) to their starting position, above your chest. At this point your arms should still be extended and the motion is controlled through your pectoral muscles.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Dumbbell Flyes or Pec Deck
es: Coge dos mancuernas y acuéstese en un banco inclinado (con el pecho mirando hacia el techo) que tenga un ángulo de inclinación de aproximadamente 30 grados.
Con una ligera flexión de los codos, extienda los brazos hacia el techo hasta que queden casi bloqueados.
Gire las muñecas para que las palmas queden ahora una frente a la otra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, baje los brazos formando un arco amplio mientras gira las muñecas hasta que sienta un estiramiento en el pecho y las mancuernas queden perpendiculares al suelo. Consejo: Mantén los codos ligeramente doblados durante todo el movimiento para reducir la tensión en las articulaciones.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, haz una breve pausa antes de exhalar y devolver las mancuernas (por el mismo camino) a su posición inicial, encima de tu pecho. En este punto, tus brazos aún deben estar extendidos y el movimiento debe controlarse a través de los músculos pectorales.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: aperturas inclinadas con mancuernas o plataforma Pec

Once you have reached the bottom of the movement, pause for a brief moment before exhaling and returning the dumbbells (along the same path) to their starting position, above your chest. At this point your arms should still be extended and the motion is controlled through your pectoral muscles.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Flyes With A Twist or Pec Deck

name: Neutral Grip Incline Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, bring your thumb the same side of the dumbbell as your fingers. keep your palms facing away from you.
To initiate this movement, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling. Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you go and continue to press until your arms are at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90 degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you (especially with this grip) to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Incline Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, bring your thumb the same side of the dumbbell as your fingers. keep your palms facing away from you.
To initiate this movement, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling. Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you go and continue to press until your arms are at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90 degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you (especially with this grip) to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Incline Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 grados), colocando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, lleve el pulgar al mismo lado de la mancuerna que los dedos. Mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti.

Para iniciar este movimiento, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo. Aprieta los músculos pectorales durante el movimientos y continúa presionando hasta que tus brazos estén completamente extendidos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y baje los brazos al lado del pecho hasta que los codos vuelvan a estar a 90 grados.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: siempre tenga un observador contigo (especialmente con este agarre) para ayudarte durante todo el movimiento y para ayudar a descargar las mancuernas una vez finalizado.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith.

aliases: Hammer Grip Incline DB Bench Press

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squats
instructions: Grab a dumbbell and hold it by one of it's ends, close to your chest. Adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
As you inhale, bend at your knees and waist in order to squat until your thighs become parallel (or just past) to the floor. Tip: Maintain an upright torso throughout the movement.
At the bottom of the movement, pause for a moment, then push through your heels whilst exhaling until you return to a standing position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you have any lower back issues, this may not be the most suitable exercise for you. A suggestion would be to try a Leg Press Machine instead.
Variation: Kettlebell Goblet Squat or Wide Stance Leg Press.

es: Coge una mancuerna y sujétala por uno de sus extremos, cerca de tu pecho. Adopte una posición de pie con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, doble las rodillas y la cintura para ponerse en cuclillas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos (o justo más allá) del suelo. Consejo: Mantén el torso erguido durante todo el movimiento.
En la parte inferior del movimiento, haz una pausa por un momento, luego empuja con los talones mientras exhalas hasta volver a la posición de pie.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: si tiene problemas de espalda baja, puede que este no sea el ejercicio más adecuado para ti. Una sugerencia sería probar una máquina de press de piernas.
Variación: sentadilla en copa con pesa rusa o press de piernas en posición amplia.

name: Front Raise And Pullover
instructions: Grab a barbell and lay down on a flat bench. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) and at full arms reach, allow the barbell to rest across your thighs. This is your starting position.

Inhale and pull the bar in a semicircular motion up and over your torso, maintaining a slight bend at your elbows as you go. Continue to extend the barbell up and over your body until your arms are parallel with the floor above your head. Your palms will then be facing the ceiling.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the barbell back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Dumbbell Press or Cable Front Raise.

en: Grab a barbell and lay down on a flat bench. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) and at full arms reach, allow the barbell to rest across your thighs. This is your starting position.

Inhale and pull the bar in a semicircular motion up and over your torso, maintaining a slight bend at your elbows as you go. Continue to extend the barbell up and over your body until your arms are parallel with the floor above your head. Your palms will then be facing the ceiling.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the barbell back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Dumbbell Press or Cable Front Raise.
es: Coge una barra y recuéstate en un banco plano. Adopte un agarre prono (con las palmas hacia los muslos) y, con los brazos completamente extendidos, permita que la barra descanse sobre los muslos. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Inhale y tire de la barra con un movimiento semicircular hacia arriba y sobre el torso, manteniendo una ligera flexión de los codos durante el movimiento. Continúa extendiendo la barra hacia arriba y sobre tu cuerpo hasta que sus brazos queden paralelos al suelo sobre su cabeza. Entonces tus palmas estarán mirando hacia el techo.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press Arnold con mancuernas o elevación frontal con cable.

name: Front Plate Raise
instructions: Grab a weight plate and adopt a shoulder width, standing stance. Next, make sure that you grip the plate in a '9' and '3' O'Clock position. Allow your arms to hang in front of your torso, vertical from the floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and in an arcing motion, lift the weight plate up in front of your body until you reach head height.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weight plate back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Dumbbell Press or Cable Front Raise.

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Grab a weight plate and adopt a shoulder width, standing stance. Next, make sure that you grip the plate in a '9' and '3' O'Clock position. Allow your arms to hang in front of your torso, vertical from the floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and in an arcing motion, lift the weight plate up in front of your body until you reach head height.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weight plate back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Dumbbell Press or Cable Front Raise.
es: Agarra una disco de peso y adopte una postura de pie a la altura de los hombros. A continuación, asegúrate de sujetar el disco en la posición '9' y '3' en punto. Deja que sus brazos cuelguen frente a su torso, verticales desde el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y, con un movimiento de arco, levante el disco de pesas frente a tu cuerpo hasta alcanzar la altura de la cabeza.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese el disco de pesas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press Arnold con mancuernas o elevación frontal con cable.

name: Front Incline Dumbbell Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on an incline bench (around 45-60 degrees). Have your arms by your sides at full extension, with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a slight bend at your elbows, exhale and lift the dumbbells in an arcing motion up in front of you, rotating your wrists as you go until you get to head height. You should now have an overhand grip (palms facing the floor).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Front Cable Raise or Alternating Front Raises.

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on an incline bench (around 45-60 degrees). Have your arms by your sides at full extension, with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a slight bend at your elbows, exhale and lift the dumbbells in an arcing motion up in front of you, rotating your wrists as you go until you get to head height. You should now have an overhand grip (palms facing the floor).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Front Cable Raise or Alternating Front Raises.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstese en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 45 a 60 grados). Mantén los brazos a los lados en extensión completa, con un agarre neutral (las palmas una frente a la otra). Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes una ligera flexión en los codos, exhala y levanta las mancuernas en un movimiento de arco frente a ti, girando las muñecas durante el movimientos hasta llegar a la altura de la cabeza. Ahora deberías tener un agarre prono (con las palmas hacia el suelo).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Elevación frontal con cable o elevaciones frontales alternas.

name: Standing Dumbbell Front Raises
instructions: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of your thighs at arms length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs.  This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left dumbbell to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hands always facing down.  Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor.  Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position as you simultaneously lift the right dumbbell.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for each arm.
Variations: This exercise can also be performed both arms at the same time.  Also, you could use a barbell as well.

name.es: Elevaciones frontales con mancuernas de pie

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Pick a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso and the dumbbells on front of your thighs at arms length with the palms of the hand facing your thighs.  This will be your starting position.

While maintaining the torso stationary (no swinging), lift the left dumbbell to the front with a slight bend on the elbow and the palms of the hands always facing down.  Continue to go up until you arm is slightly above parallel to the floor.  Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top. Inhale after the second pause.
Now lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position as you simultaneously lift the right dumbbell.
Continue alternating in this fashion until all of the recommended amount of repetitions have been performed for each arm.
Variations: This exercise can also be performed both arms at the same time.  Also, you could use a barbell as well.
es: Elija un par de mancuernas y párese con el torso recto y las mancuernas frente a los muslos con los brazos extendidos y las palmas de las manos hacia los muslos.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene el torso inmóvil (sin balancearse), levante la mancuerna izquierda hacia el frente con una ligera flexión del codo y las palmas de las manos siempre hacia abajo.  Continúa subiendo hasta que tu brazo esté ligeramente por encima del paralelo al suelo.  Exhala mientras ejecutas esta parte del movimiento y haz una pausa por un segundo en la parte superior. Inhala después de la segunda pausa.
Ahora baje la mancuerna lentamente hasta la posición inicial mientras levanta simultáneamente la mancuerna derecha.
Continúa alternando de esta manera hasta que se haya realizado toda la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones para cada brazo.
Variaciones: Este ejercicio también se puede realizar con ambos brazos al mismo tiempo.  Además, también puedes usar una barra.

sourceClip.title: How To Do A STANDING DUMBBELL FRONT RAISE | Exercise Demonstration Video and Guide

name: Front and Side Raises
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt an upright, standing position. Have your arms at full extension, relaxed by your sides.
Next, whilst maintaining a slight bend at your elbows, exhale and lift the dumbbells out in front of you until they are at shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Again, exhale but this time lift the dumbbells out laterally to your sides, pause when you get to shoulder level.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Continue to alternate in this fashion until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Arnold Press or Bradford:Rocky Presses.

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt an upright, standing position. Have your arms at full extension, relaxed by your sides.
Next, whilst maintaining a slight bend at your elbows, exhale and lift the dumbbells out in front of you until they are at shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Again, exhale but this time lift the dumbbells out laterally to your sides, pause when you get to shoulder level.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Continue to alternate in this fashion until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Arnold Press or Bradford:Rocky Presses.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una posición erguida y de pie. Mantén los brazos completamente extendidos, relajados a los lados.
A continuación, mientras mantienes una ligera flexión en los codos, exhala y levanta las mancuernas frente a ti hasta que estén a la altura de los hombros.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las pesas a tu costado.
Nuevamente, exhale, pero esta vez levante las mancuernas lateralmente hacia los costados, haga una pausa cuando llegue al nivel de los hombros.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las pesas a tu costado.
Continúa alternando de esta manera hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Arnold Press sentado o Bradford:Rocky Presses.

name: Seated Rotating Bicep Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on an incline bench. Have your arms by your side at full extension, palms facing each other. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm and elbows tucked in close to your torso, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. As you go, exhale and rotate your palms so that they are facing yourself. Squeeze your biceps for a brief moment once they are fully contracted before descending the dumbbells along the same path as you inhale (Remember to rotate your wrists as you bring the dumbbells back to their starting position).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Close-Grip EZ Bar Curl or Cable Curls.

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on an incline bench. Have your arms by your side at full extension, palms facing each other. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm and elbows tucked in close to your torso, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. As you go, exhale and rotate your palms so that they are facing yourself. Squeeze your biceps for a brief moment once they are fully contracted before descending the dumbbells along the same path as you inhale (Remember to rotate your wrists as you bring the dumbbells back to their starting position).
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Close-Grip EZ Bar Curl or Cable Curls.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco inclinado. Mantén los brazos a los lados en extensión completa, con las palmas una frente a la otra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene la parte superior del brazo inmóvil y los codos pegados al torso, doble las mancuernas hacia los hombros. Mientras avanzas, exhala y gira las palmas de las manos para que queden hacia ti. Aprieta tus bíceps por un breve momento una vez que estén completamente contraídos antes de descender las mancuernas por el mismo camino mientras inhalas (recuerda girar las muñecas mientras llevas las mancuernas a su posición inicial).
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl con barra EZ con agarre cerrado o Curl con cable.

name: Dumbbell Upright Rows
instructions: Grab two dumbbells with an overhand grip. The ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another as they rest on your thighs, arms hanging perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the dumbbells as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the dumbbells up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbows out wide. Continue to pull them upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbows should be above the dumbbells.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Barbell Upright Rows or Smith Machine Upright Row

en: shoulders
es: hombros

en: biceps
es: bíceps

en: Grab two dumbbells with an overhand grip. The ends of the dumbbells gently touching one another as they rest on your thighs, arms hanging perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the dumbbells as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the dumbbells up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbows out wide. Continue to pull them upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbows should be above the dumbbells.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Barbell Upright Rows or Smith Machine Upright Row
es: Agarra dos mancuernas con un agarre prono. Los extremos de las mancuernas se tocan suavemente entre sí mientras descansan sobre los muslos, con los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta y mantenga las mancuernas lo más cerca posible de tu cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.

Exhale y levante las mancuernas hacia la barbilla contrayendo los hombros y abriendo bien los codos. Continúa tirando de ellos hacia arriba hasta llegar a la barbilla. En este punto tus codos deben estar por encima de las mancuernas.
Haz una pausa por un breve momento, luego inhale y regrese las mancuernas por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Variaciones: remo vertical con barra o remo vertical con máquina Smith

name: Dumbbell Tricep Extension -Pronated Grip
instructions: Lie down on a flat bench holding two dumbbells directly above your shoulders.  Your arms should be fully extended and form a 90 degree angle from your torso and the floor.
The palms of your hands should be facing forward, and your elbows should be tucked in.  This will be your starting position.
Now, inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells until they are near your ears.  Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in.
Then, exhale and use your triceps to return the weight to the starting position.

name.es: Extensión de tríceps con mancuerna, agarre prono

en: triceps
es: tríceps

en: Lie down on a flat bench holding two dumbbells directly above your shoulders.  Your arms should be fully extended and form a 90 degree angle from your torso and the floor.
The palms of your hands should be facing forward, and your elbows should be tucked in.  This will be your starting position.
Now, inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells until they are near your ears.  Be sure to keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows tucked in.
Then, exhale and use your triceps to return the weight to the starting position.
es: Acuéstese en un banco plano sosteniendo dos mancuernas directamente encima de sus hombros.  Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos y formar un ángulo de 90 grados desde tu torso y el suelo.
Las palmas de las manos deben mirar hacia adelante y los codos deben estar pegados al cuerpo. Esta será su posición inicial.
Ahora, inhala y baja lentamente las mancuernas hasta que estén cerca de tus oídos.  Asegúrate de mantener la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles y los codos doblados.
Luego, exhala y usa tus tríceps para devolver el peso a la posición inicial.

name: Stiff Leg Dumbbell Deadlifts
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart. Have your arms in front of you but still perpendicular to the floor (palms facing your thighs). Slightly bend at your knees and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the dumbbells close to you as you go. Keep lowering the dumbbells towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso straight again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Barbell Stiff Legged Deadlift.

name.es: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas con mancuernas

en: hamstrings
es: isquiosurales

en: glutes
lower back
es: glúteos
zona lumbar

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart. Have your arms in front of you but still perpendicular to the floor (palms facing your thighs). Slightly bend at your knees and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your knees stationary, inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the dumbbells close to you as you go. Keep lowering the dumbbells towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso straight again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variation: Barbell Stiff Legged Deadlift.
es: Coge un par de mancuernas y adopta una posición de pie con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Mantén los brazos frente a ti pero aún perpendiculares al suelo (con las palmas hacia los muslos). Doble ligeramente las rodillas y mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes las rodillas quietas, inhala mientras te inclinas hacia adelante desde la cintura (recuerda mantener la espalda recta), manteniendo las mancuernas cerca del cuerpo durante el movimiento. Sigue bajando las mancuernas hacia tus pies hasta que sientas un estiramiento en los isquiosurales.

Después de una breve pausa, vuelva a enderezar el torso empujando las caderas hacia adelante. Consejo: Recuerde, todo este movimiento se realiza con las piernas "rígidas" (ligeramente doblada en la rodilla, pero no más) y la espalda recta en todo momento. Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: este no es un ejercicio para personas con problemas de espalda. Evite movimientos bruscos ya que esto podría causar lesiones graves.
Variación: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas con barra.

sourceClip.title: How To Do A DUMBBELL STIFF LEG DEADLIFT | Exercise Demonstration Video and Guide

name: Dumbbell Step Ups
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and stand with a shoulder width stance in front of a step. The height of the step should be realistic to the ability of the user (palms facing each other). This is your starting position.

Place your right foot on the step/bench. Step up onto the step/bench by pushing through your right heel. As your do so your hip and knee joints should straighten out. Lift your left leg onto the step/bench at this point. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.

Step off the step/bench with the left leg by bending at the hip and knee joints of the right leg, inhale as you do so. Return to the original standing position by taking your right foot off the step/bench.
Alternate as you go along and repeat until you have performed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Step Ups or Single Leg Leg Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and stand with a shoulder width stance in front of a step. The height of the step should be realistic to the ability of the user (palms facing each other). This is your starting position.

Place your right foot on the step/bench. Step up onto the step/bench by pushing through your right heel. As your do so your hip and knee joints should straighten out. Lift your left leg onto the step/bench at this point. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.

Step off the step/bench with the left leg by bending at the hip and knee joints of the right leg, inhale as you do so. Return to the original standing position by taking your right foot off the step/bench.
Alternate as you go along and repeat until you have performed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Step Ups or Single Leg Leg Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros frente a un escalón. La altura del escalón debe ser realista para la capacidad del usuario (con las palmas una frente a la otra). Esta es tu posición inicial.

Coloca su pie derecho en el escalón/banco. Sube al escalón/banco empujando con el talón derecho. Mientras lo hace, las articulaciones de la cadera y la rodilla deben enderezarse. En este punto, levante la pierna izquierda sobre el escalón/banco. Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.

Bájese del escalón/banco con la pierna izquierda doblando las articulaciones de la cadera y la rodilla de la pierna derecha, inhale mientras lo haces. Vuelva a la posición de pie original quitando el pie derecho del escalón/banco.
Alterne durante el movimiento y repita hasta que haya realizado la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Step Ups con barra o Press de piernas con una sola pierna.

name: Dumbbell Squat To A Bench
instructions: Position a bench behind you as if you were going to sit down. Now, grab two dumbbells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs), infront of the bench.
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a stright back. This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor and your glutes touch the bench. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Smith Machine Squats.

es: Coloca un banco detrás de ti como si fueras a sentarte. Ahora, agarre dos mancuernas y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera (con las palmas hacia el costado de las piernas), frente al banco.
Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y la espalda erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas hasta que tus muslos queden paralelos al suelo y tus glúteos toquen el banco. Mantén la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, haz una pausa por un segundo antes de empujar el torso hacia la posición inicial a través de los talones. Al descender, inhala y al ascender, exhala. Ahora deberías estar en la posición inicial, listo para comenzar de nuevo.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Esté siempre consciente de su postura al realizar este ejercicio, ya que, si se realiza incorrectamente, podría causar lesiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con barra o sentadillas con máquina Smith.

Descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Smith Machine Squats.
